title: Quasiparticle Quality Factors in Superconducting Resonators: Effects of Bath Temperature and Readout Power
summary: The performance of superconducting resonators underpins a wide range of modern quantum technologies, yet their quality factor often deviates at low temperatures from standard Mattis-Bardeen predictions. This discrepancy is often attributed to nonthermal quasiparticles generated by microwave readout power, which limits the sensitivity of superconducting devices. We present a macroscopic model based on modified Rothwarf-Taylor equations that incorporates a power-dependent phonon generation term, providing an explicit relationship between quality factor, bath temperature and readout power. The model shows excellent agreement with temperature sweep measurements of NbN microstrip resonators with \b{eta}-Ta terminations over a wide dynamic range of readout power levels, accurately capturing the transition between thermally-dominated and microwave-induced loss regimes. This framework provides a predictive tool for optimizing superconducting resonators and advancing the design of high-Q devices for quantum sensing and quantum information processing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了基于修正Rothwarf-Taylor方程的宏观模型，引入功率依赖的声子产生项，准确描述了超导谐振器在低温下品质因子随温度和读出功率的变化，在NbN微带谐振器上得到实验验证。
AI.motivation: 超导谐振器在低温下的品质因子偏离标准Mattis-Bardeen理论预测，传统上归因于微波读出功率产生的非热准粒子，但缺乏定量模型来描述这一现象，限制了高灵敏度超导器件的优化设计。
AI.method: 基于修正的Rothwarf-Taylor方程，引入与读出功率相关的声子产生项，构建品质因子与浴温度及读出功率之间的显式关系式，并在NbN微带谐振器（含β-Ta终端）上进行温度扫描测量验证。
AI.result: 模型在宽动态范围的读出功率水平下与实验数据吻合良好，准确捕捉了热主导损耗与微波诱导损耗之间的转变区域。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为优化超导谐振器提供了预测工具，有助于推动用于量子感知和量子信息处理的高Q值器件设计。

title: Hole-Doping Suppresses Competing Magnetism in High-DOS C136 Carbon Schwarzite: A Computational Route Toward Superconductivity in Negative-Curvature Carbon Networks
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures. Follow-up to arXiv:2605.02082. No superconductivity claim; lattice stability and electron-phonon coupling remain open
summary:
Carbon schwarzites are negative-curvature carbon networks with electronic structures distinct from graphene, fullerenes, and conventional carbon allotropes. Here we report a spin-polarized first-principles screening study of D-type C136 carbon schwarzite focused on the competition between magnetism, doping, and high-DOS metallic behavior. Neutral C136 has a robust competing magnetic branch, with total magnetization of about 11.01-11.03 Bohr magnetons per 136-atom cell. Charged-cell calculations reveal a clear electron-hole asymmetry: adding two electrons per cell increases the total magnetization to 12.11 Bohr magnetons per cell, while removing two electrons reduces it to 9.61. Further hole doping suppresses the magnetic branch monotonically, giving 8.02, 6.34, and 4.76 Bohr magnetons per cell for removal of 4, 6, and 8 electrons, respectively.
  The most strongly hole-doped point, h8, was examined with spin-polarized NSCF and density-of-states calculations on a 4x4x4 k-point mesh. The NSCF Fermi energy, -0.7414 eV, agrees with the SCF value, -0.7413 eV. The DOS remains high near the Fermi level: at E = -0.740 eV, the total DOS is about 44.69 states/eV/cell, with DOS_up = 33.11 and DOS_down = 11.58 states/eV/cell. Thus h8 combines substantial suppression of the competing magnetic branch with preservation of a high-DOS metallic state.
  We do not claim superconductivity in C136. Instead, these calculations identify hole doping as a route for suppressing a competing magnetic instability while preserving electronic conditions relevant for further superconductivity screening. Lattice stability, electron-phonon coupling, and transition-temperature estimates remain open problems.

AI.tldr: 本文通过自旋极化第一性原理计算，系统研究了D型C136碳负曲率网络中磁性、掺杂与高态密度金属行为的竞争关系，发现空穴掺杂可有效抑制竞争性磁性分支，同时保持高DOS金属态，为超导筛选提供了潜在路径。
AI.motivation: 碳负曲率网络（碳Schwarzites）具有区别于石墨烯、富勒烯等常规碳同素异形体的独特电子结构，但其磁性、掺杂与金属性之间的竞争关系尚不明确。本文旨在通过第一性原理筛选，揭示这些竞争机制，并探索通过掺杂调控电子性质的可行途径。
AI.method: 采用自旋极化第一性原理计算方法，对D型C136碳Schwarzite进行系统的筛选研究。首先计算中性C136的磁性竞争分支，获得总磁化强度约11.01-11.03玻尔磁子/136原子晶胞。随后进行带电晶胞计算，研究电子/空穴掺杂对磁性的影响（分别添加或移除2、4、6、8个电子）。对最强空穴掺杂点h8（移除8个电子）进行了自旋极化非自洽场(NSCF)和态密度(DOS)计算，采用4x4x4 k点网格。
AI.result: 中性C136具有强竞争磁性分支。电子-空穴掺杂呈现明显不对称性：添加2个电子使总磁化强度增至12.11玻尔磁子/晶胞，移除2个电子则降至9.61；继续空穴掺杂使磁性单调抑制，移除4、6、8个电子时分别为8.02、6.34和4.76。h8点的NSCF费米能(-0.7414 eV)与SCF值高度一致(-0.7413 eV)。在费米能附近(E=-0.740 eV)，总DOS约44.69 states/eV/cell，其中自旋向上33.11、自旋向下11.58。
AI.conclusion: 空穴掺杂是抑制C136中竞争性磁不稳定性同时维持高DOS金属态的有效途径。本文不声称C136具有超导性，而是通过计算识别了空穴掺杂这一调控策略，为后续超导筛选提供了电子结构基础。晶格稳定性、电声耦合和转变温度估算仍是待解决的关键问题。

title: Superconductivity Mediated Long Range Magnetic Coupling
summary: We study a Rashba superconductor thin film with ferromagnetic insulators (FIs) placed on top of it. We show that the ferromagnetic insulators generate circular super-currents, enabling long-range magnetic interactions (LRMI), decaying in power laws. In the static case, the long-range magnetic interaction can be ferromagnetic, in contrast to previous studies showing that superconductor mediates anti-ferromagnetic interactions decaying exponentially. Surprisingly, we find that in the dynamic case, the LRMI has a different distance dependence. Our results have potential applications in superconducting spintronics.

AI.tldr: 研究Rashba超导薄膜上放置铁磁绝缘体产生的长程磁相互作用，发现静态下为铁磁性（反传统认知），动态下距离依赖关系不同。
AI.motivation: 探索Rashba超导体中由铁磁绝缘体诱导的环形超电流能否产生长程磁相互作用，从而突破传统超导仅介导指数衰减反铁磁相互作用的认知局限。
AI.method: 理论分析Rashba超导薄膜与铁磁绝缘体复合结构，通过环形超电流的生成机制推导静态和动态下的长程磁相互作用。
AI.result: 静态下铁磁绝缘体可诱导铁磁性的长程相互作用（非指数衰变），动态下距离依赖关系与静态不同。
AI.conclusion: 该发现颠覆了超导仅介导反铁磁指数衰减相互作用的传统观点，为超导自旋电子学提供了新的物理机制和潜在应用方向。

title: Apparent double-$T_c$ from a single BKT transition in anisotropic phase-only models
summary: Transport experiments on two-dimensional superconductors often yield direction-dependent transition temperatures, raising the question of whether such a ``double-$T_c$'' reflects a true thermodynamic splitting or a transport artifact. To establish a baseline, we study a minimal anisotropic phase-only Josephson-junction array in equilibrium and under resistively shunted junction dynamics with fluctuating twist boundary conditions. The equilibrium model exhibits a single Berezinskii--Kosterlitz--Thouless (BKT) transition. Out of equilibrium, anisotropic Josephson couplings and anisotropic dissipation reshape the linear $R$--$T$ curves in a finite-size, finite-current crossover regime, so that curve-shape criteria such as Halperin--Nelson fits and fixed-resistance thresholds yield an apparent double-$T_c$. In contrast, critical-scaling criteria -- the universal exponent $α=3$ and dynamic finite-size scaling -- remain consistent with the single $T_{\mathrm{BKT}}$. A robust splitting that persists in the nonlinear critical scaling, such as that recently reported at KTaO$_3$ interfaces, therefore points to physics beyond this clean anisotropic baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文通过研究各向异性相位-only Josephson结阵列，证明各向异性耦合和耗散会在有限尺寸、有限电流的交叉区域中产生虚假的“双Tc”现象，但临界标度准则仍与单一BKT温度一致，表明KTaO3界面等体系中观测到的稳健分裂需要超越这一各向异性基线的物理机制。
AI.motivation: 二维超导体输运实验中常出现方向依赖的转变温度（“双Tc”），引发其是真实热力学分裂还是输运假象的争议。本文旨在通过建立各向异性基线的理论模型，区分真伪双Tc现象。
AI.method: 采用最小各向异性相位-only Josephson结阵列模型，在平衡态下分析BKT转变，并在非平衡态下结合电阻分流结动力学和涨落扭曲边界条件，研究各向异性Josephson耦合和各向异性耗散对线性R-T曲线的影响。
AI.result: 平衡模型呈现单一BKT转变。非平衡下，各向异性Josephson耦合和各向异性耗散使有限尺寸、有限电流交叉区域的线性R-T曲线变形，导致Halperin-Nelson拟合和固定电阻阈值等曲线形状判据给出虚假的双Tc；而临界标度判据（普适指数α=3和动态有限尺寸标度）仍与单一TBKT一致。
AI.conclusion: 稳健的双Tc分裂若在非线性临界标度中持续存在（如KTaO3界面），则需要超越本文建立的各向异性干净基线的物理机制。

title: Criticality in optical properties of the Drude and Drude-Sommerfeld metals around the plasma frequencies for high carrier concentrations
summary: We have analytically determined the attenuation constant of the Drude metal for the entire range of frequency ($0<ω<\infty$) of an electromagnetic (plane) wave incident on it within a single framework of classical electrodynamics. Here, by the Drude metal, we mean an electrical conductor that obeys the Drude model for the conduction electrons. We further consider the conductor to have linear dielectric and magnetic properties (i.e. permittivity $ε>ε_0$ and permeability $μ>μ_0$) due to the bound charges and bound currents in the background. Interestingly, for such a conductor with a high carrier concentration ($ω_pτ\gg1$), we have obtained a simple form of the attenuation constant $k_-\simeq+\sqrt{\frac{με}{2}}\sqrt{ω_p^2-ω^2+|ω_p^2-ω^2|}$ for a wide range of high frequencies below and above plasma frequency $ω_p$. Such a result gives rise to criticality in the conductor's optical properties, such as -- the attenuation constant, group velocity, and complex dielectric constant near around $ω=ω_p$. We have obtained the critical exponents for these quantities. We also have obtained a quantum correction to the optical properties within the Drude-Sommerfeld model with the Thomas-Fermi screening.

AI.tldr: 本文在经典电动力学框架内，解析推导了Drude金属在整个频率范围内（0<ω<∞）的衰减常数，发现了高载流子浓度下在等离子体频率附近的临界行为，并计算了临界指数及量子修正。
AI.motivation: 在单一理论框架内完整描述Drude金属在整个电磁波频谱上的衰减特性，特别是在等离子体频率附近的临界行为尚未被系统地解析研究。
AI.method: 基于经典电动力学，结合Drude模型（含线性介电和磁响应），推导了全频率范围内的衰减常数解析表达式；在高载流子浓度（ω_pτ≫1）条件下简化得到近似的临界形式；并引入Drude-Sommerfeld模型与Thomas-Fermi屏蔽进行量子修正。
AI.result: 得到了衰减常数k_的简洁形式：k_≃+√(με/2)√(ω_p²−ω²+|ω_p²−ω²|)（高载流子浓度高频范围），并发现了衰减常数、群速度和复介电常数在ω=ω_p处的临界性，计算了对应的临界指数。
AI.conclusion: Drude金属在等离子体频率附近表现出临界行为，其光学性质（衰减常数、群速度、介电常数）具有明确的临界指数；量子修正可通过Drude-Sommerfeld模型和Thomas-Fermi屏蔽获得。

title: Nonlinear Coherent Transport in 2D Thermal Metamaterials: From Solitons and Topological Defects to Quantum Computing
summary: Understanding heat transport in low-dimensional and nano-architectured materials remains a central challenge in nonequilibrium statistical physics due to persistent deviations from Fourier's law. These deviations are driven by anharmonicity, reduced dimensionality, and the emergence of long-lived coherent excitations. In this work, we develop a unified theoretical framework for two-dimensional thermal metamaterials that combines nonlinear lattice dynamics, soliton-based effective field theories, and geometrically organized defect networks as guiding structures for energy flow. We introduce minimal discrete and continuum-inspired models suitable for controlled benchmarking of thermal transport in patterned two-dimensional architectures and identify a two-channel transport mechanism in which coherent nonlinear excitations coexist with incoherent hydrodynamic modes. The interplay between these channels is shown to be highly sensitive to geometry, nonlinearity, and temperature, offering new avenues for thermal management. We establish rigorous connections between microscopic nonlinearity, geometry-driven channeling of heat in two dimensions, and quantum-enabled exploration of both high-occupation classical regimes and genuinely quantum regimes beyond the reach of standard simulation strategies. The theoretical predictions are corroborated by recent experimental and computational results in Stone-Wales-defected PdSSe monolayers and silicon phononic crystal nanostructures, which exhibit ultra-low thermal conductivity coexisting with high carrier mobility and strong anisotropy -- direct manifestations of the two-channel mechanism. This synthesis provides actionable guidance for the design of engineered heat-spreading architectures and positions quantum simulation as a transformative tool for advancing the theory of nonlinear heat transport.

AI.tldr: 本文针对低维和纳米结构材料中傅里叶定律失效的热传输问题，提出了一个统一理论框架，揭示了二维热超材料中相干非线性激发与非相干流体动力学模式共存的“双通道”传热机制，并通过缺陷工程和量子模拟为热管理设计提供了理论指导。
AI.motivation: 低维和纳米结构材料中传热行为持续偏离傅里叶定律，传统的热传输理论无法解释由非谐性、降维和长寿命相干激发导致的异常热传导现象，亟需建立新的理论框架来理解和调控这类材料中的能量流动。
AI.method: 提出了结合非线性晶格动力学、基于孤子的有效场论以及几何组织的缺陷网络作为能量流引导结构的统一理论框架；构建了适用于受控基准测试的离散和连续介质启发模型；建立了微观非线性、几何驱动热通道化与量子探索之间的严格联系。
AI.result: 识别出“双通道”传热机制：相干非线性激发与非相干流体动力学模式共存；证明了通道间相互作用对几何结构、非线性和温度高度敏感；理论预测与PdSSe单层膜和硅声子晶体纳米结构的实验和计算结果相吻合，这些材料表现出超低热导率、高载流子迁移率和强各向异性。
AI.conclusion: 该理论框架为设计工程化热扩散架构提供了可操作的指导，并将量子模拟定位为推进非线性热传输理论发展的变革性工具。

title: Two-dimensional Clay Channels for Tunable Nanofluidic Memristor
summary: Dynamic reconfiguration of charge carriers in confined ion-channels under electrical stimulation produces memory effects, where the internal resistance depends on history of the electric field. Vermiculite nanofluidic devices harness this effect to store and process information within a single component. We report switching between distinct memory loops by tuning ion transport pathways, governed by asymmetrical device architecture and intrinsic surface-charge. Polarity-dependent memory switching between crossing-1 and crossing-2 loops is achieved solely by altering electrode configurations, without modifying electrolyte, channel surface chemistry or device structure: providing mechanistic insights into ionic memristors through a straightforward, experimentally validated strategy. The memristive characteristics are demonstrated in both in-plane and out-of-plane channel configurations with channel lengths spanning from centimeters to micrometers length scales using re-stacked vermiculite membranes and further investigated for miniaturization with devices having nanometer scale channel lengths, fabricated via ultramicrotomy method. Furthermore, we demonstrate neuromorphic functionalities, including synaptic potentiation-depression and programmable memory retention, highlighting potential for bio-inspired computing systems. Cost-effective and scalable fabrication solution processed vermiculite membrane memristors pave the way for practical integration of nanofluidic memristors for neuromorphic computing applications.

AI.tldr: 本文研究蛭石纳米流体器件中受限离子通道在电场刺激下的动态重构产生记忆效应，通过改变电极配置实现极性依赖的记忆开关，并在多尺度（厘米到纳米）通道中验证了忆阻特性，展示了突触可塑性等神经形态功能，为低成本、可扩展的离子忆阻器用于神经形态计算提供了新策略。
AI.motivation: 探索离子忆阻器中电荷载流子在受限离子通道中的动态重构机制，寻找一种简单、可实验验证的策略来理解离子忆阻器的记忆开关行为，并推动其在实际神经形态计算系统中的应用。
AI.method: 利用蛭石纳米流体器件，通过改变电极配置（无需改变电解液、通道表面化学或器件结构）实现极性依赖的记忆环切换；采用重新堆叠的蛭石膜构建面内和面外通道配置，通道长度从厘米到微米尺度；通过超薄切片法制备纳米级通道长度的器件进行小型化研究。
AI.result: 实现了crossing-1和crossing-2记忆环之间的极性依赖切换；在厘米到纳米尺度的通道中均验证了忆阻特性；展示了突触增强-抑制和可编程记忆保留等神经形态功能。
AI.conclusion: 通过简单的电极配置改变即可调控离子忆阻器的记忆行为，揭示了离子传输路径与器件不对称结构及表面电荷的内在关系；溶液处理的蛭石膜忆阻器具有成本效益和可扩展性，为纳米流体忆阻器在神经形态计算中的实际集成铺平了道路。

title: Machine learning the non-radiative decay modes in photochemical processes
summary: Non-radiative decay in photoexcited molecular systems is driven by nuclear motion toward conical intersections (CIs), where electronic states become degenerate and nonadiabatic transitions occur. Identifying the nuclear degrees of freedom responsible for CI access from nonadiabatic molecular dynamics (NAD) simulations remains challenging because the underlying motions are high-dimensional and collective. Here, we introduce an unsupervised, information-theoretic framework based on Differentiable Information Imbalance (DII) to identify the nuclear coordinates governing CI access directly from trajectory surface hopping (TSH) simulations. By quantifying correlations between structural descriptors and electronic observables, including energy gaps and oscillator strengths, the method ranks nuclear degrees of freedom by predictive relevance. A multi-step protocol then extracts low-dimensional, physically interpretable modes associated with non-radiative decay. We apply the framework to the methaniminium cation, furan, L-glutamine, L-pyroglutamine-ammonium, and a photoactive molecular motor. Across all systems, the method recovers known mechanistic coordinates while revealing the relative importance of competing modes when multiple structural distortions contribute to CI access. The analysis also reveals a systematic distinction between observables: energy gaps are typically governed by a small number of localized coordinates, whereas oscillator strengths depend on more collective and distributed structural rearrangements. Overall, the DII-based framework combines predictive power with direct interpretability, providing a general and scalable route for extracting mechanistic insight from high-dimensional NAD data and constructing reduced-dimensional models of excited-state dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于可微信息不平衡（DII）的无监督信息论框架，直接从轨迹面跳跃（TSH）模拟中识别驱动锥形交叉（CI）访问的关键核自由度，在多个分子体系中成功提取了低维、可物理解释的反应坐标，揭示了能隙与振子强度对不同核坐标的差异化依赖。
AI.motivation: 非绝热分子动力学模拟中，识别导致锥形交叉访问的关键核自由度非常困难，因为这些运动是高维且集体性的，缺乏从海量轨迹数据中自动提取可解释反应坐标的有效方法。
AI.method: 基于可微信息不平衡（DII）的无监督学习框架，通过量化结构描述符与电子可观测量（能隙、振子强度）之间的相关性，对核自由度进行预测重要性排序，再通过多步协议提取低维、可物理解释的运动模式。
AI.result: 在甲亚胺阳离子、呋喃、L-谷氨酰胺、L-焦谷氨酰胺-铵及光驱动分子马达等多个体系中，该方法成功恢复了已知的机理坐标，揭示了竞争模态的相对重要性，并发现能隙由少数局域坐标主导，而振子强度依赖更集体性的结构重排。
AI.conclusion: DII框架兼具预测能力与直接可解释性，为从高维非绝热动力学数据中提取机理洞见、构建降维激发态动力学模型提供了通用且可扩展的途径。

title: Mirror transitions in diffusion with stochastic resetting confined on a ring
summary: Diffusion with an incorporated resetting mechanism provides a reference framework for modeling a wide range of natural phenomena. Within this framework, the optimal resetting rate is a key quantity that arises from the optimization of the mean first-passage time. While substantial work has focused on the study of the optimal resetting rate in unbounded one dimensional domains, little is still known about the optimization of the mean first-passage time in bounded systems, in particular when multiple resetting sites are available. In this work, we consider a particle diffusing along a circular circumference and under resetting, with an absorbing target site at a fixed location. Using the appropriate free propagator for this system, we compute the Laplace transform of the survival probability when resetting occurs to multiple sites drawn from an arbitrary probability density function. We also calculate the mean first-passage time at the target site, and study the dependence of the optimal resetting rate in terms of the relevant parameters of the system in a two-resetting site configuration. Depending on the arc length between one of the resetting sites and the absorbing target site, and the weight of the remaining resetting site, the optimal resetting rate can exhibit abrupt ("first order'') and continuous ("second order'') transitions. Moreover, the behavior of the mean first-passage time is rich enough to allow both critical and tri-critical points to exist in the parameter space. All the transitions have "mirror symmetry'' around the selected target site and its corresponding diametrically opposite site.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在圆形边界上带有重置机制的扩散过程，重点分析了多重置点配置下平均首达时间的优化问题，发现了最优重置率的一阶和二阶相变现象，以及对径对称的临界点和三临界点。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多集中在无界一维空间中的最优重置率，而关于有界系统（尤其是多重置点场景）中平均首达时间优化问题知之甚少，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 利用圆形系统的自由传播子，计算了任意重置点分布下存活概率的拉普拉斯变换，进而推导平均首达时间，重点分析了双重置点配置的参数依赖性。
AI.result: 最优重置率可表现出非连续（一阶）和连续（二阶）相变；参数空间中存在临界点和三临界点；所有相变关于目标点及其对径点呈现镜像对称性。
AI.conclusion: 有界环形系统中多重置点配置的MFPT优化展现出丰富的相变行为，为理解复杂系统中的重置机制提供了新视角。

title: Crystal Fractional Graph Neural Network for Energy Prediction of High-Entropy Alloys
summary: High-entropy alloys (HEAs) have attracted growing attention for their exceptional mechanical and thermal properties arising from complex atomic configurations. In this paper, we propose crystal fractional graph neural network for predicting the energy of high-entropy alloys by explicitly integrating both local atomic environments and global compositional information. The model consists of three components: a crystal graph neural network, which employs graph attention network layers to learn local interactions among 16 on-site atoms within the crystal lattice; fractional neural network, a fully connected network that embeds the global fraction of constituent elements; and feature fusion neural network, which fuses the outputs of the two submodels to predict the total crystal energy. We train the model on a dataset of 1,049 crystal structures and validate it on 198 quaternary structures, optimizing all hyperparameters via Optuna. Our results show that our model achieves an RMSE comparable to first-principles calculations and maintains high accuracy even for low-energy configurations. However, the model exhibits limitations in handling large crystal cells, which we aim to address in future work to extend its applicability to more complex systems.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种晶体分数图神经网络（Crystal Fractional Graph Neural Network），通过整合局部原子环境和全局组成信息来预测高熵合金的能量，在1049个晶体结构上训练，在198个四元结构上验证，达到了与第一性原理计算相当的RMSE精度。
AI.motivation: 高熵合金因其复杂的原子构型而具有优异的力学和热学性能，但传统方法难以准确高效地预测其能量，亟需一种能够同时捕捉局部原子环境和全局成分信息的模型。
AI.method: 模型由三部分组成：晶体图神经网络（使用图注意力网络学习晶格中16个局域原子的相互作用）、分数神经网络（全连接网络嵌入全局元素组分）、特征融合神经网络（融合两个子模型输出以预测总晶体能量）。使用Optuna优化超参数。
AI.result: 在1049个晶体结构上训练，198个四元结构上验证，模型RMSE与第一性原理计算相当，对低能构型保持高精度，但在处理大晶胞时存在局限性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的CFGNN模型在高熵合金能量预测上表现优异，但处理大晶胞的能力有限，未来将扩展至更复杂系统。

title: Layer-antisymmetric pair-phase resonance at the bonding-antibonding splitting in the AA-stacked bilayer attractive Hubbard model
summary: The relative phase between the two pair condensates of a bilayer s-wave superconductor is a collective degree of freedom distinct from the usual in-phase Anderson-Bogoliubov mode. Working at the Gaussian fluctuation level for the AA-stacked attractive-Hubbard honeycomb bilayer, we show analytically that the layer-antisymmetric pair-phase channel hosts an in-gap collective pole at twice the single-particle interlayer hopping, $2t_h$, precisely the bonding-antibonding band splitting. The mechanism is algebraic: at this frequency, the antisymmetric phase bubble reduces pointwise in momentum space to the static symmetric phase bubble that enforces the in-phase Goldstone pole. The resulting resonance scale is therefore fixed by the single-particle hybridization, rather than by the interaction-driven Josephson coupling that controls the canonical Leggett mode. The identity is verified numerically by direct Bogoliubov-de Gennes calculations. The diagonal antisymmetric phase-channel kernel zero is exact within Gaussian theory at any chemical potential; the full coupled amplitude-phase pole coincides with it at half filling and tracks it closely away from half filling. The excitation is Raman-forbidden by inversion, which motivates layer-odd probes. We find that a layer-imbalance drive has finite Gaussian-level overlap with the pair-phase sector, suggesting a possible cold-atom layer-bias response feature near the sub-kilohertz scale for typical optical-lattice parameters.

AI.tldr: 本文研究双层s波超导体中一种独特的集体激发——层反对称对相位模式，发现其共振频率固定为单粒子层间跃迁2t_h，而非传统Leggett模式的相互作用驱动约瑟夫森耦合。该模式在半填充时精确成立，可通过冷原子层偏置探测实现亚千赫兹响应。
AI.motivation: 揭示双层超导体中除常规同相位Anderson-Bogoliubov模和Leggett模之外的新集体自由度，并探索其物理机制与可观测效应。
AI.method: 基于AA堆叠吸引Hubbard蜂窝双层模型，在Gaussian涨落水平上进行解析分析（通过代数约化证明相位气泡恒等式），并结合Bogoliubov-de Gennes数值验证。
AI.result: 层反对称对相位通道在频率2t_h处存在带内集体极点，该频率精确等于键合-反键合带分裂；解析证明该极点源自对称与反对称相位气泡间的代数恒等式；数值计算确认其精确性；该模式被反演对称性禁止拉曼响应，但可通过层不平衡驱动耦合到对相位扇区。
AI.conclusion: 发现了一种由单粒子杂交（而非相互作用）决定共振频率的新型集体激发模，其与Leggett模有本质区别；在冷原子光学晶格中可通过层偏置驱动实现亚千赫兹尺度探测，为研究多体系统中的隐藏集体模式提供了新途径。

title: Bound-State Spectra of a Lifshitz-Type Dirac Equation in (2+1) Dimensions
summary: We investigate a Dirac-type equation in (2+1) dimensions modified by Lifshitz spatial derivatives with dynamical exponent $z=2$, focusing on the spectral properties of bound states under radial confinement. Analytical solutions are obtained for constant backgrounds, hard-wall confinement, and harmonic potentials, while logarithmic confinement is treated numerically via the Numerov method and complemented by a semiclassical WKB analysis. The resulting spectra exhibit characteristic scaling laws governed by the Lifshitz parameter $b$, including $E - M \propto b/R_0^2$ for hard-wall confinement, $E - M \propto \sqrt{2b}\,ω$ for harmonic trapping, and $E - M \sim α\ln\sqrt{b}$ in the semiclassical regime of logarithmic confinement. These results provide a consistent characterization of how higher-order spatial derivatives modify bound-state spectra in two-dimensional Dirac systems and may be relevant for effective descriptions of materials with quadratic low-energy dispersion, such as bilayer graphene and related anisotropic 2D systems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了(2+1)维Lifshitz修正Dirac方程（动力学指数z=2）在几种约束势下的束缚态谱，解析求解了常背景、硬壁和谐振子约束，数值求解了对数约束，揭示了谱随Lifshitz参数b的标度律。
AI.motivation: 探索高阶空间导数（Lifshitz修正）如何改变二维Dirac系统中的束缚态谱特性，为理解具有二次低能色散的材料（如双层石墨烯）提供理论描述。
AI.method: 对常背景、硬壁约束和谐振子势采用解析求解；对对数约束使用Numerov方法进行数值计算，并辅以WKB半经典分析。
AI.result: 得到了三种约束下的标度律：硬壁约束下E-M ∝ b/R₀²，谐振子约束下E-M ∝ √(2b)ω，对数约束半经典区E-M ∼ α ln√b。
AI.conclusion: 系统刻画了Lifshitz修正对二维Dirac束缚态谱的影响，为双层石墨烯等各向异性二维材料中的有效理论提供了参考。

title: Construction and Analysis of the Effective Model for the Bulk Steady State under Current in Boundary-Driven Open Systems
summary: Current-induced phenomena are often obscured by Joule heating, and their steady states are difficult to analyze in large open systems. We introduce a translationally invariant asymmetric-hopping model as an effective bulk description of boundary-driven systems under current. In a minimal case, it corresponds to an open-system Hatano--Nelson model. We find that the effective temperature rises linearly with current density, as observed experimentally. The model provides a useful tool for separating intrinsic current-induced effects from heating.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种平移不变的非对称跳跃模型，作为边界驱动系统在电流作用下的有效体描述。该模型的最小形式对应开放系统的Hatano-Nelson模型，发现有效温度随电流密度线性上升，与实验观察一致，为分离电流诱导效应与焦耳热效应提供了工具。
AI.motivation: 电流诱导现象常被焦耳热掩盖，且在大开放系统中难以分析稳态。现有方法难以区分本征电流效应与热效应，亟需一个能有效描述边界驱动系统体性质的模型。
AI.method: 引入平移不变的非对称跳跃模型作为边界驱动系统的有效体描述；在最小情况下对应开放系统Hatano-Nelson模型；通过理论分析建立有效温度与电流密度的线性关系。
AI.result: 发现有效温度随电流密度线性上升，这一结果与实验观察一致。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为分离电流诱导本征效应与焦耳热效应提供了有用工具，有助于更清晰地理解电流驱动系统中的物理现象。

title: SLayerGen: a Crystal Generative Model for all Space and Layer Groups
summary: Crystal generative models have shown rapid progress for accelerating the discovery of bulk, periodic materials. However, many material systems such as 2D superconductors, thin film semiconductors, and catalytic surfaces are diperiodic, i.e., aperiodic along one of the lattice directions. These systems are invariant under the layer groups, which are known to influence materials properties yet not considered by existing models. In this paper, we propose SLayerGen, a generative model that produces crystals constrained to be invariant to any space or layer group. SLayerGen consists of coarse-to-fine discrete autoregressive lattice generation; transformer-based autoregressive sampling of Wyckoff positions, elements, and numbers of symmetrically unique atoms; and space or layer group equivariant diffusion of atomic coordinates. For the diffusion component, we corrected an inconsistency in the loss from prior work arising from hexagonal groups being non-orthogonal in fractional coordinates. To facilitate progress in generative modeling of diperiodic materials, we assembled and filtered datasets of monolayers and bilayers, propose relevant evaluation metrics, and developed novel representations for layer group symmetries. For de novo generation of diperiodic materials, SLayerGen achieves consistent performance gains over bulk crystal generative models and is competitive when training jointly on bulk and diperiodic materials.

AI.tldr: SLayerGen 是一种能够生成受任意空间群或层群约束的晶体的生成模型，采用粗到细的自回归晶格生成、基于Transformer的Wyckoff位置采样以及等变扩散方法，并专门针对双周期材料（如单层和双层材料）进行了优化，在生成性能上优于现有体相晶体生成模型。
AI.motivation: 现有晶体生成模型主要针对体相周期性材料，忽略了大量在实际应用中重要的双周期材料（如2D超导体、薄膜半导体、催化表面等），这些材料在层群对称性下具有不变性，而现有模型无法处理这种对称性约束。
AI.method: SLayerGen 包含三个核心组件：1) 粗到细的离散自回归晶格生成；2) 基于Transformer的自回归采样Wyckoff位置、元素种类和对称唯一原子数量；3) 空间群或层群等变的原子坐标扩散过程。此外，还修正了先前工作中六方群分数坐标非正交导致的损失不一致问题。
AI.result: 在从头生成双周期材料方面，SLayerGen 持续优于体相晶体生成模型；在联合训练体相和双周期材料时也表现出竞争力。同时构建了单层和双层数据集、提出了相关评估指标和层群对称性表示方法。
AI.conclusion: SLayerGen 是首个能同时处理空间群和层群对称性的晶体生成模型，有效填补了双周期材料生成领域的空白，为2D材料、薄膜和催化表面等实际应用提供了有力工具。

title: On the existence of distinct equilibrium configurations under orienting external electric fields
summary: Oriented external electric fields are ubiquitous in chemistry; however, the effects of fields applied in different directions on molecular systems remain underexplored. A major challenge is that an applied field exerts a torque on a molecule, reorienting the molecular frame and complicating the interpretation of orientation-dependent electric-field effects. Thus, free polar molecules experience orienting rather than oriented fields. In this work, we explore a new regime of distinct molecular equilibrium configurations, differing in the relative direction of the external field and the molecular frame, enabled by exploiting molecular polarizability rather than static dipole moment. These distinct "directomers" exhibit unique electronic and nuclear configurations, particularly in their low-lying excited states. We employ oriented electric field vectors referenced to a molecule-fixed principal axis frame along with hybrid analytical-numerical geometry optimization in order to explore the rotational potential energy surface (rRES), as well as a simply analytic model based on equilibrium electrical properties which captures the double-well character of the rPES, including some geometry relaxation effects.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"directomers"概念——通过分子极化率而非静态偶极矩，在外电场作用下产生不同分子平衡构型（即取向异构体），并发展了一种混合分析-数值几何优化方法探索转动势能面。
AI.motivation: 定向外电场在化学中普遍存在，但不同方向电场对分子体系的影响研究不足。主要困难在于电场会对分子施加扭矩导致分子框架重新取向，使得自由极性分子经历的是"取向场"而非"定向场"，因此需要新方法研究分子相对于电场的定向效应。
AI.method: 利用分子极化率（而非静态偶极矩）产生不同的平衡构型；发展以分子固定主轴为参考系的定向电场向量方法；采用混合分析-数值几何优化探索转动势能面（rPES）；建立基于平衡电性质的解析模型捕捉rPES的双阱特征，并考虑部分几何弛豫效应。
AI.result: 发现了被称为"directomers"的独特分子平衡构型，其在电子和原子核构型（尤其是低激发态）上均表现不同；转动势能面呈现双阱特征。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用分子极化率而非偶极矩，实现了在外电场下分子平衡构型的新调控维度，为理解电场方向依赖的分子效应提供了新视角和理论工具。

title: A Closer Look on the Influence of Constraints Upon the Optimization of the Nonadditive Entropic Functional $S_{q}$
summary: The thermal-equilibrium canonical distribution is currently obtained by maximizing the Boltzmann-Gibbs-von Neumann-Shannon entropy $S_{BG}(p)=k\sum^{W}_{i=1}p_{i}\ln 1/p_{i}$ constrained to $\sum^{W}_{i=1}p_{i}=1$ and $\sum^{W}_{i=1}p_{i}\,e_{i}=U$, $e_{1}\leq\ldots\leq e_{W}$ being the energies of the $W$ possible states and $U\in[e_{1},e_{W}]$ their mean value. We revisit a generalized version of this optimization problem grounded in the nonadditive entropy $S_{q}(p)=k\,(\sum^{W}_{i=1}p_{i}^{q}-1)/(1-q)$ (frequently, though not necessarily, $q\in(0,1)$; $S_1=S_{BG}$), and the constraint $\sum^{W}_{i=1} p_{i}^{q^{\prime}}e_{i} / \sum^{W}_{i=1}p_{i}^{q^{\prime}}=U$, $q^{\prime}>0$. Sufficient conditions for existence, strict positivity, and uniqueness of solutions are derived, along with a theorem that enables their closed-form calculation. We apply these results to deepen the understanding of the two standard cases in the literature ($q^{\prime}=1$ and $q^{\prime}=q$), as well as of a new one ($q^{\prime}=2-q$). We prove that these standard cases are the only ones yielding optimizing probability distributions of $q$-exponential form. Furthermore, we define an effective temperature $T_{q,q^{\prime}}$ through a Clausius-like relation $1/T_{q,q^{\prime}}=\partial S_{q} / \partial U$ and derive a Helmholtz-like energy $F_{q,q^{\prime}}=U-T_{q,q^{\prime}}S_{q}$, with the former grounding the validity of the $0^{th}$ Principle of Thermodynamics within this generalized statistical mechanics. Finally, we show that the case with a linear constraint (i.e., $q^{\prime}=1$) with $q\in(0,1)$ (i) preserves the Third Law of Thermodynamics; (ii) can be used to model classical many-body Hamiltonian systems with arbitrarily-ranged interactions; and (iii) resembles features of low-dimensional nonlinear dynamical systems at the edge of chaos.

AI.tldr: 本文在非广延熵$S_q$框架下，系统研究了广义统计力学中优化问题的数学条件（存在性、正性、唯一性）与解析解，证明了仅当$q'=1$或$q'=q$时优化分布才具有$q$-指数形式，定义了有效温度与亥姆霍兹类自由能，并展示了线性约束情形($q'=1, q\in(0,1)$)满足热力学第三定律、可建模长程相互作用系统及混沌边缘动力学。
AI.motivation: 经典统计力学基于Boltzmann-Gibbs熵最大化得到正则分布，但该框架在处理长程相互作用、非广延系统及混沌边缘动力学时存在局限。作者旨在通过非广延熵$S_q$推广优化问题，建立严格的数学基础，并揭示不同约束形式的物理意义与适用范围。
AI.method: 在非广延熵$S_q$下引入广义约束$\sum_i p_i^{q'} e_i / \sum_i p_i^{q'}=U$，通过拉格朗日乘子法进行优化；推导解的存在性、正性与唯一性的充分条件；分析$q'=1$、$q'=q$和$q'=2-q$三种情形的分布形式；通过Clausius关系定义有效温度$T_{q,q'}$并建立类亥姆霍兹自由能。
AI.result: (1) 推导了优化问题解的数学条件与封闭形式计算定理；(2) 证明仅$q'=1$和$q'=q$两种情形给出$q$-指数形式分布；(3) 建立了有效温度$T_{q,q'}$及亥姆霍兹类自由能$F_{q,q'}$；(4) 线性约束情形($q'=1, q\in(0,1)$)满足热力学第三定律、适用于长程相互作用系统和混沌边缘动力学。
AI.conclusion: 本文为非广延统计力学提供了严格的数学基础，明确了不同约束形式的物理意义与适用范围，特别是$q'=1$线性约束情形在长程相互作用系统与混沌动力学中的有效性，为广义统计力学的热力学公理化奠定了基础。

title: On Reconstructing Conservative and Primitive Variables: An Eigenvector Analysis on Curvilinear Grids
comment: It's a technical note in support of earlier papers
summary: In wall-modelled large-eddy simulations of hypersonic boundary-layer transition, Hoffmann, Chamarthi and Frankel reported that characteristic reconstruction based on conservative-variable eigenvectors produced markedly better results than the corresponding primitive-variable implementation. The observation was empirical. A subsequent wave-appropriate conservative reconstruction (WA-CR) algorithm used a rank-one entropy correction based on the premise that contact-discontinuity error lies in a single conservative entropy/contact direction. This note gives the algebraic foundation for both observations. For the standard conservative curvilinear eigenvectors, the density row of the right-eigenvector matrix contains exact, metric-free zeros in the shear columns, so shear waves carry no density perturbation and a contact discontinuity is represented by the conservative entropy eigenvector alone. The conservative left eigenvectors provide the dual projection property: the entropy amplitude is obtained with a metric-independent left eigenvector and has unit contact scaling, while total-energy perturbations have zero projection onto the shear amplitudes. In the standard primitive curvilinear eigenvectors, by contrast, shear right eigenvectors contain metric-dependent density components and the primitive entropy left eigenvector contains metric-weighted tangential-velocity terms. Thus the conservative formulation supplies the two algebraic requirements for an exact, sufficient, metric-invariant, rank-one entropy correction: metric-independent entropy projection and a metric-independent entropy update direction. Curvilinear metrics make the distinction explicit, but the conservative state-space contact direction is already the natural direction underlying WA-CR even on Cartesian grids.

AI.tldr: 本文为壁模大涡模拟中高超声速边界层转捩问题提供了代数基础，解释了为何基于守恒变量的特征重构优于原始变量实现，并给出了波适应守恒重构算法中秩一熵修正的代数条件：守恒型右特征向量中剪切波不携带密度扰动，左特征向量提供度规无关的熵投影。
AI.motivation: Hoffmann等人通过经验观察发现，在壁模大涡模拟高超声速边界层转捩时，基于守恒变量的特征重构效果明显优于原始变量实现；后续WA-CR算法基于"接触间断误差位于单一守恒熵/接触方向"这一前提提出秩一熵修正。本文旨在为这两个经验观察提供严格的代数理论基础。
AI.method: 从代数角度分析守恒型和原始型曲线坐标系特征向量矩阵的结构差异：1) 守恒型右特征向量矩阵的密度行在剪切列中存在精确的、与度规无关的零元素；2) 守恒型左特征向量提供对偶投影性质——熵幅值由度规无关的左特征向量获得且具有单位接触标度，总能扰动在剪切幅值上的投影为零；3) 对比原始型中剪切右特征向量包含度规依赖的密度分量，熵左特征向量包含度规加权的切向速度项。
AI.result: 守恒型公式提供了实现精确、充分、度规无关的秩一熵修正所需的两个代数条件：度规无关的熵投影和度规无关的熵更新方向。即使在笛卡尔网格上，守恒状态空间中的接触方向也已经是WA-CR算法的自然方向。
AI.conclusion: 曲线坐标系度规使守恒型与原始型的代数差异更加显式化，但其本质差异独立于网格类型。该代数基础验证了WA-CR算法中秩一熵修正的合理性，并为高超声速边界层转捩模拟中的数值方法选择提供了理论依据。

title: Ginzburg--Landau Theory for Confined Thin-Film Superconductors
summary: We develop a Ginzburg--Landau theory for superconducting thin films under quantum confinement. Starting from the microscopic BCS free energy and the recently developed confinement theory of metallic thin films, explicit analytical expressions are derived for the Ginzburg--Landau coefficients, coherence length, penetration depth, electronic mean free path, and Ginzburg--Landau parameter in confined geometries. The central result is that quantum confinement directly renormalizes the intrinsic superconducting coherence length through confinement-induced modifications of the electronic density of states and Fermi energy. This effect is absent in conventional thin-film transport theories based solely on surface scattering. As a consequence, confinement simultaneously suppresses the coherence length and enhances the penetration depth, thereby driving superconductors toward progressively stronger type-II behavior with decreasing film thickness. The theory predicts a crossover regime in which confinement-induced renormalization of superconducting length scales and transport scattering become strongly intertwined. Comparison with recent penetration-depth measurements in Al thin films shows that the observed enhancement of the penetration depth originates from the interplay between confinement-induced renormalization of the coherence length and suppression of the effective mean free path by surface and disorder scattering. The results establish a direct connection between quantum confinement and superconducting electrodynamics in confined metallic films.

AI.tldr: 该论文发展了量子受限超导薄膜的金兹堡-朗道理论，揭示了量子受限效应会重新归一化超导相干长度，同时抑制相干长度并增强穿透深度，使超导体随膜厚减小趋向更强的第二类超导行为，并与Al薄膜实验吻合。
AI.motivation: 现有薄膜输运理论仅考虑表面散射，缺乏对量子受限效应（电子态密度和费米能级修正）如何影响超导本征长度尺度的理解，因此需要建立包含量子受限的Ginzburg-Landau理论。
AI.method: 从微观BCS自由能出发，结合金属薄膜受限理论，推导了受限几何下Ginzburg-Landau系数、相干长度、穿透深度、电子平均自由程和Ginzburg-Landau参数的解析表达式。
AI.result: 量子受限直接重新归一化超导相干长度；受限同时抑制相干长度并增强穿透深度，驱动超导体向更强第二类超导行为转变；存在受限效应与输运散射强耦合的交叉区间；与Al薄膜穿透深度实验吻合。
AI.conclusion: 建立了量子受限与受限金属薄膜中超导电动力学之间的直接联系，揭示了量子效应对超导长度尺度的调控机制。

title: Microscopic resonant-shell mechanism for slow Liouvillian sectors in an open correlated lattice
summary: We develop a microscopic theory for how slow Liouvillian sectors are selected in an open correlated lattice. The starting point is not a postulated non-Hermitian band, but a local interacting resonance between an on-site doublon and a branch-resolved nearest-neighbor bond. This resonance defines a composite shell orbital whose doublon weight controls reservoir visibility and whose mixed doublon-bond character controls shell mobility. Projecting the microscopic hopping onto the selected shell yields a branch-selective dimerized channel. In the dilute regime, a boundary doublon-loss channel yields an exponentially slow edge-memory pole through a Zeno-type return. At the shell-critical point, the edge pole is replaced by a near-zero standing-wave doublet with an algebraic coherent spacing. At finite shell filling, the same local shell becomes density dressed. A number-conserving phase-locking jump removes a bright mismatch sector, leaving defects as the asymptotic slow variables and producing a diffusive finite-size gap. We derive the local shell, the projected branch topology, the edge-memory law, the shell-critical doublet, the density-dressed shell Hamiltonian, and the defect generator within one Schur-projection framework. The resulting mechanism identifies the reservoir-engineered fast block as the selector of the observable slow sector, while the microscopic parent shell remains fixed.

AI.tldr: 本文发展了一种微观理论，解释开放关联晶格中如何选择慢李雅普诺夫扇区，核心是通过一个复合壳层轨道及其投影机制，统一描述了从边缘记忆到临界双峰、再到缺陷扩散的慢动力学行为。
AI.motivation: 为了理解开放量子多体系统中慢李雅普诺夫扇区的选择机制，不依赖于非厄米能带的假设，而是从局域相互作用的共振出发，建立微观理论。
AI.method: 从局域doublon-键共振定义复合壳层轨道，将微观跳跃投影到该壳层得到支路选择性二聚化通道；通过Schur投影框架统一推导壳结构、分支拓扑、边缘记忆律、临界双峰、密度修饰壳哈密顿量及缺陷生成器。
AI.result: 得到边缘记忆极点的Zeno型返回、壳临界点的近零驻波双峰、密度修饰后的有限尺寸扩散间隙等渐近慢变量行为。
AI.conclusion: 库工程快块是慢扇区的选择器，而微观母壳保持不变，揭示了慢动力学选择的微观起源。

title: Rashba engineering at van der Waals interfaces
summary: Two-dimensional transition metal dichalcogenide (TMD) interfaces offer a versatile platform for studying emergent quantum phenomena and enabling novel device functionalities. When distinct TMD monolayers are stacked vertically or laterally stitched, their interfaces can exhibit unique electronic band alignments, giving rise to long-lived interlayer excitons, charge transfer effects, and moiré superlattices with correlated states. Here, we demonstrate that the interface between a large variety of two different epitaxially grown TMD monolayers controls the intensity and sign of the Rashba spin splitting, which is probed using THz spintronic emission. Optimized TMD heterobilayers, such as HfSe$_2$/PtSe$_2$, show enhanced THz emission that surpass the spin-to-charge conversion efficiency of bulk TMDs, confirming the presence of Rashba states with large spin splitting at the interface. By combining spin- and angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy with density functional theory, we reveal that the electronic hybridization between the two different TMD monolayers gives rise to extended in-gap states with strong Rashba spin-orbit coupling. The choice of TMD layers enables to engineer the sign and strength of spin-to-charge conversion in van der Waals heterobilayers opening up perspectives to build efficient and tunable THz spintronic emitters.

AI.tldr: 本文发现两种不同TMD单层之间的界面可以控制Rashba自旋劈裂的强度和符号，并通过THz自旋电子发射进行探测。优化后的HfSe₂/PtSe₂异质双层展现了超越块体TMD的自旋-电荷转换效率，为可调谐THz自旋电子发射器提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 探索TMD异质界面中Rashba自旋劈裂的调控机制，并实现高效、可调谐的THz自旋电子发射器。
AI.method: 结合THz自旋电子发射、自旋和角度分辨光电子能谱（SARPES）以及密度泛函理论（DFT）计算，系统研究不同TMD单层堆叠界面的电子结构和自旋-电荷转换特性。
AI.result: 优化TMD异质双层（如HfSe₂/PtSe₂）展现出增强的THz发射，效率超越块体TMD；界面电子杂化导致强Rashba自旋-轨道耦合的扩展带隙态；可通过选择TMD层来工程化自旋-电荷转换的符号和强度。
AI.conclusion: TMD异质界面是实现高效、可调谐THz自旋电子发射器的理想平台，为开发新型自旋电子器件开辟了新方向。

title: Photovoltaic Possibility of Cu2SiSe3 and Cu2SnS3 Ternary Chalcogenides- Single Junction to Tandem Architecture
comment: 28 Pages, 15 Figures, Submitted to Solar Energy Journal
summary: Cu based ternary chalcogenides are gathering attention for sustainable energy applications due to their reduced complexity compared to quaternary alternatives. We used drift diffusion modeling to evaluate the feasibility of photovoltaics employing ternary chalcogenide absorbers based on Cu2SiSe3 and Cu2SnS3. The device metrics are evaluated by analyzing absorber layer thickness intrinsic carrier concentration defect density and energy band alignment at interfacial junctions. The optimized single junction Cu2SiSe3 based device configuration achieves a power conversion efficiency of 18.13 percent exhibiting a short circuit current density of 38 mA cm^-2 and an open circuit voltage of 0.64 V. The Cu2SnS3 based device achieves an efficiency of 15.59 percent with a short circuit current density of 48.8 mA cm^-2 and an open circuit voltage of 0.42 V. We examined the impact of the buffer layer on device parameters uncovering further avenues for performance improvement. Additionally we simulated a two terminal tandem solar cell using Cu2SiSe3 Eg 1.44 eV in the upper cell to capture photons from the visible spectrum and Cu2SnS3 Eg 0.91 eV in the lower cell to absorb from the infrared spectrum. The simulated tandem architecture, featuring a VOC of 1.24 V a JSC of 24.6 mA cm^-2 a fill factor (FF) of 79.2 percent and an efficiency of 24.1 percent markedly surpassed conventional single junction devices demonstrating the viability of Cu2SiSe3-Cu2SnS3 absorber-based tandem solar cells for next generation high-efficiency solar technologies.

AI.tldr: 本文通过漂移扩散模型评估了基于Cu2SiSe3和Cu2SnS3的三元硫族化物太阳能电池性能，单结器件分别实现了18.13%和15.59%的效率，而两端叠层器件效率达到24.1%，展示了其在下一代高效太阳能技术中的潜力。
AI.motivation: 三元硫族化物相比四元材料成分更简单，有望降低光伏器件的复杂性，但目前对其光伏可行性的系统评估不足，亟需通过数值模拟探索其潜力。
AI.method: 采用漂移扩散模型（drift diffusion modeling）进行器件模拟，分析吸收层厚度、本征载流子浓度、缺陷密度及界面能带对齐等关键参数，优化单结器件，并构建两端叠层结构（顶电池Cu2SiSe3带隙1.44 eV，底电池Cu2SnS3带隙0.91 eV）。
AI.result: Cu2SiSe3单结效率18.13%（Jsc 38 mA/cm², Voc 0.64 V）；Cu2SnS3单结效率15.59%（Jsc 48.8 mA/cm², Voc 0.42 V）；叠层器件效率24.1%（Voc 1.24 V, Jsc 24.6 mA/cm², FF 79.2%）。
AI.conclusion: 三元硫族化物Cu2SiSe3和Cu2SnS3作为吸收层材料具有可行性，叠层结构显著超越单结性能，为下一代高性价比、高效太阳能电池提供了新方向。

title: Path Dependence in Alchemical Calculations of Water Chemical Potential in Aqueous Electrolytes
summary: Accurate calculation of free energies and their derivatives is central to assessing the thermodynamic stability of molecular and particulate systems across length scales. Yet such quantities can be difficult to compute reliably in strongly interacting systems, such as solutions of ionic species in polar solvents. One important example is the chemical potential of water in aqueous electrolytes, which can be estimated through staged particle insertion by gradually coupling an inserted molecule to its environment. Although the resulting insertion free energy should be independent of the alchemical pathway, the order and manner in which van der Waals and electrostatic interactions are activated can strongly affect convergence and, in some cases, yield inconsistent estimates. Here, we examine this issue by calculating water's chemical potential in aqueous KCl solutions using eight alchemical insertion pathways that differ in the extent and order of van der Waals and Coulombic coupling. We find that concurrently activating these interactions, particularly in fully coupled and partially end-coupled protocols, can produce chemically implausible insertion free energies. These anomalies arise from intermediate states in which the inserted water molecule develops strong electrostatic interactions with a chloride ion before sufficient short-range repulsion has been established. In contrast, pathways that activate short-range van der Waals interactions before electrostatics yield more consistent and chemically plausible estimates. These findings demonstrate that practical alchemical calculations in polar and ionic environments can be highly sensitive to pathway design, underscoring the importance of decoupling short-range and electrostatic interactions in staged insertion alchemical protocols.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了水在KCl水溶液中化学势的八种不同热力学路径计算，发现同步激活范德华和静电相互作用会导致不合理的自由能估计，而先激活短程范德华力再处理静电作用的路径则更可靠。
AI.motivation: 准确计算强相互作用体系（如离子溶液）的自由能及其导数对评估热力学稳定性至关重要，但传统方法在极性和离子环境中难以可靠收敛，且不同路径可能给出不一致的结果。
AI.method: 采用八种不同的热力学插入路径（在范德华和库仑耦合的顺序与程度上有所区别），通过逐步粒子插入法计算水分子在KCl水溶液中的化学势，并对比各路径的收敛性和物理合理性。
AI.result: 同步激活范德华和静电相互作用（特别是完全耦合和部分端耦合协议）会产生化学上不可信的插入自由能，其异常源于中间态中插入的水分子与氯离子在缺乏足够短程排斥时产生过强的静电吸引。
AI.conclusion: 在极性和离子环境中，实际热力学路径设计对计算结果高度敏感，建议在逐步插入协议中解耦短程范德华力与静电作用，先激活短程排斥再引入静电相互作用，以确保估计的一致性和化学合理性。

title: Condensation Transition in Entropy-Constrained Probability Spaces
summary: The organization of high-dimensional probability spaces is a fundamental problem at the intersection of statistical physics and information theory. Here, we analyze the distributions populating level surfaces of the probability simplex $Δ_{K-1}$ defined by a fixed Shannon entropy. We introduce a discretization strategy that assigns equal statistical weight to distinct microstate distributions and enables a combinatorial analysis of the simplex. A condensation phase transition is shown to take place below a critical entropy that scales as $H_c \simeq \log K - 1 + γ$ in the thermodynamic limit. For entropy values $H_0 < H_c$, the overwhelming majority of distributions are found in a condensed state, in which a single component captures a macroscopic fraction of the total probability mass while the remaining components form a homogeneous fluid background. These results provide a framework for understanding phenomena such as overconfident predictions in machine learning and the emergence of dominant species in ecology, and suggest that sparsity can arise naturally from entropic constraints in high-dimensional manifolds.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了概率单纯形上固定香农熵水平集的分布结构，发现低于临界熵时会出现“凝聚相变”——单个分量占据大部分概率质量，其余分量形成均匀背景。这一发现解释了机器学习中的过度自信预测和生态学中优势物种涌现等现象。
AI.motivation: 高维概率空间的组织结构是统计物理与信息论交叉的基本问题，现有研究缺乏对固定熵水平集上分布结构的深入理解。
AI.method: 引入一种离散化策略，使不同微观状态分布具有相等的统计权重，从而实现对概率单纯形的组合分析。
AI.result: 发现了凝聚相变现象：临界熵 H_c ≃ log K - 1 + γ，当熵 H_0 < H_c 时，绝大多数分布处于凝聚态——单个分量占据宏观概率质量，其余分量形成均匀流体背景。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可解释机器学习中的过度自信预测和生态学中优势物种涌现等现象，表明稀疏性可以从高维流形的熵约束中自然产生。

title: Nonlinear GENERIC Informed Neural Networks (N-GINNs): learning GENERIC dynamics with non-quadratic dissipation potentials
summary: We introduce Nonlinear GENERIC Informed Neural Networks (N-GINNs), a deep learning framework for discovering evolution equations of systems governed by the nonlinear GENERIC formalism (General Equation for Non-Equilibrium Reversible-Irreversible Coupling). Such systems exhibit coupled conservative and dissipative dynamics, and can be described via the superposition of a Hamiltonian flow and a generalized gradient flow. In contrast to existing approaches, our formulation incorporates generalized gradient flows via convex dissipation potentials, enabling the identification of a broader class of thermodynamically consistent dynamics, including systems with non-quadratic dissipation potentials. Thermodynamic structure is strongly enforced by construction through suitable reparameterizations of both the bivector operator and the dissipation potential, ensuring exact compliance with the first and second laws of thermodynamics. We validate the proposed approach on three representative examples: a harmonic oscillator coupled to a heat bath, an idealized chemical motor, and a one-dimensional viscoplastic model of Perzyna type. These results demonstrate the method's ability to accurately infer thermodynamically consistent models from data for systems incorporating both conservative and nonlinear dissipative dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出N-GINNs框架，利用非线性GENERIC形式主义从数据中发现热力学一致的系统演化方程，通过凸耗散势处理非二次耗散，并严格保证热力学第一、第二定律。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常假设二次耗散势（线性耗散），无法处理更广泛的非线性耗散动力学。因此需要一种能够识别更一般热力学一致动力学的方法。
AI.method: 基于非线性GENERIC形式，将系统分解为哈密顿流和广义梯度流两部分；通过凸耗散势刻画广义梯度流；对双向量算子和耗散势进行适当的重参数化，强制满足热力学结构。
AI.result: 在谐振子-热浴耦合、理想化学马达、Perzyna型一维粘塑性模型三个实例上验证，准确推断出包含保守和非线性耗散动力学的热力学一致模型。
AI.conclusion: N-GINNs能够从数据中准确发现具有非线性耗散的热力学一致演化方程，拓展了GENERIC-informed神经网络的应用范围至非二次耗散系统。

title: Transverse Magnetic Response from Orbitally Polarized Cooper Pairs in Elemental Superconductors
summary: We demonstrate how crystalline symmetry lowering, as for instance through strain, allows elemental superconductors such as vanadium and niobium to realize spin-singlet orbitally polarized Cooper pairs composed of electrons with identical orbital moments. Using superconducting density functional theory, we show that lowering of trigonal symmetry to $C_s$, thus keeping only a single mirror plane, activates interorbital pairing in bulk and (111) surfaces, with a pronounced surface enhancement. In a magnetic field, the resulting orbitally polarized superconducting state leads to a novel transverse magnetic response. For in--plane field orientations that break the remaining mirror symmetry, a sizable orbital magnetization emerges perpendicular to the applied field. We show that this effect is a direct consequence of equal--orbital-moment Cooper pairing, providing an experimentally accessible signature of this state. Our results establish strained elemental superconductors as a minimal material platform for superconducting orbitronics.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了通过晶格对称性降低（如应变），使钒、铌等元素超导体实现自旋单态、轨道极化的库珀对（电子具有相同轨道角动量）。利用超导密度泛函理论，发现三角对称性降至C_s（仅保留单一镜面）可激活块体和(111)表面的轨道间配对，且表面效应显著增强。在磁场中，这种轨道极化超导态产生新颖的横向磁响应：当面内磁场打破剩余镜面对称时，出现垂直于外加磁场的轨道磁化。该效应是等轨道角动量库珀配对的直接结果，提供了可实验探测的特征。
AI.motivation: 探索元素超导体中实现轨道极化库珀配对的可能性，并寻找可实验探测的独特物理响应，为超导轨道电子学（superconducting orbitronics）提供最小材料平台。
AI.method: 采用超导密度泛函理论（SCDFT）进行计算，通过晶格对称性降低（三角→C_s）调控电子结构，分析块体与(111)表面的配对对称性及磁场响应。
AI.result: 对称性降低至C_s激活了轨道间配对，表面效应显著增强该配对；在面内磁场打破剩余镜面对称时，产生垂直于外加场的轨道磁化，该横向磁响应是等轨道角动量配对的独特特征。
AI.conclusion: 应变元素超导体（如V、Nb）可作为实现和研究轨道极化超导态的最小材料平台，横向轨道磁化响应为实验探测提供了可行的观测手段。

title: Spin Quadrupolar orders in $d$-wave Unconventional Magnetism
summary: Unconventional magnetism represents a class of metallic states whose Fermi surfaces exhibit spin-dependent splittings under the non-trivial representations of the rotation group. The $d$-wave $α$-phase unconventional magnetic state, commonly known as altermagnet, recently, has attracted significant attention. While these systems exhibit distinct anisotropic $d$-wave characteristics in momentum space, how this microscopic topology translates into the spin distributions in real space remains a question. In this work, we bridge the intrinsic spin quadrupolar ordering in momentum space to the real-space staggered magnetic distribution. By introducing a weak, non-magnetic periodic crystal potential into a $d$-wave unconventional magnetic state, the spin-charge cross susceptibility is calculated by using the linear response theory. We reveal that the interplay between the crystal potential and the intrinsic $d$-wave spin-splitting naturally induces a spatial spin quadrupole distribution without enlarging the unit cell. Our study thus provides a physical connection between momentum-space multipoles in the even partial wave channel and real-space spin multipole orders.

AI.tldr: 本文通过线性响应理论，揭示了d波非常规磁态（交变磁体）中动量空间的四极有序与实空间交错磁分布之间的物理联系，证明弱周期性晶体势可诱导实空间自旋四极分布而不扩大晶胞。
AI.motivation: 尽管d波非常规磁态在动量空间展现出明显的各向异性d波特征，但这种微观拓扑结构如何转化为实空间的自旋分布仍是一个未解之谜，作者旨在弥合这一鸿沟。
AI.method: 将弱非磁性周期性晶体势引入d波非常规磁态，利用线性响应理论计算自旋-电荷交叉响应率。
AI.result: 晶体势与内在d波自旋分裂的相互作用，可在不扩大晶胞的情况下自然诱导出实空间自旋四极分布。
AI.conclusion: 建立了动量空间偶偏波道中的多极子与实空间自旋多极序之间的物理联系。

title: Dynamically Characterizing the Structures of Dirac Points via Wave Packets
summary: Topological non-trivial band structures are the core problem in the field of topological materials. In this paper, we investigate the topological band structure in a system with controllable Dirac points from the perspective of wave packet dynamics. By adding a third-nearest-neighboring coupling to the graphene model, additional pairs of Dirac points emerge. The emergence and annihilation of Dirac points result in hybrid and parabolic points, and we show that these band structures can be revealed by the dynamical behaviors of wave packets. Particularly, for the gapped hybrid point, the motion of the wave packet shows a one-dimensional \emph{Zitterbewegung} motion. Furthermore, we also show that the winding number associated with the Dirac point and parabolic point can be determined via the center-of-mass and spin texture of wave packets, respectively. The results of this work could motivate new experimental methods to characterize the system's topological signatures through wave packet dynamics, which may also find application in systems of other exotic topological materials.

AI.tldr: 本文通过波包动力学研究具有可控狄拉克点的拓扑能带结构，发现第三近邻耦合可产生额外狄拉克点，并利用波包运动（如颤动行为）和自旋纹理揭示拓扑特征（如绕数）。
AI.motivation: 拓扑非平凡能带结构是拓扑材料领域的核心问题，作者希望从波包动力学角度探测和理解可控狄拉克点系统中的拓扑能带结构。
AI.method: 在石墨烯模型中加入第三近邻耦合，产生额外狄拉克点对；通过分析波包动力学行为（质心运动、自旋纹理）来表征能带结构及拓扑不变量。
AI.result: 发现狄拉克点的产生与湮灭会形成杂化点和抛物点；有能隙杂化点处波包呈现一维颤动运动；狄拉克点和抛物点对应的绕数可分别通过波包质心和自旋纹理确定。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为通过波包动力学实验表征拓扑材料的拓扑特征提供了新方法，并可推广至其他奇异拓扑材料系统。

title: Multiscale modeling of materials and neural operators
summary: Multiscale modeling is essential for understanding the complex behavior of materials. However, accurately transferring all relevant information from one scale to another has remained an outstanding challenge. Neural operators, discretization-independent generalizations of neural networks, is proving to be a powerful tool in addressing this challenge. This article provides an introduction to neural operators, and illustrates their use in multiscale modeling of materials through three selected examples.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了神经算子（Neural Operators）作为一种离散化无关的神经网络泛化方法，用于解决多尺度建模中跨尺度信息传递的挑战，并通过三个实例展示了其在材料多尺度建模中的应用。
AI.motivation: 多尺度建模对理解材料复杂行为至关重要，但跨尺度间准确传递所有相关信息一直是一个悬而未决的挑战。神经算子有望解决这一难题。
AI.method: 本文采用神经算子（一种离散化无关的神经网络泛化方法）作为工具，并通过三个选定的实例来说明其在材料多尺度建模中的使用。
AI.result: 通过三个实例展示了神经算子在材料多尺度建模中的应用效果。
AI.conclusion: 神经算子是解决多尺度建模中信息传递挑战的有效工具，在材料科学领域具有重要应用前景。

title: Stochastic Resolution of Identity for Correlation Energy Prediction via Doubles Connected Moments Expansion
summary: The recently developed Doubles Connected Moments (DCM) expansion offers a tractable approach for computing correlation energy, exhibiting an noniterative O(N^6) scaling with system size N. Benchmark calculations on a set of molecules demonstrate that the DCM can outperform CCSD in terms of accuracy. To further enhance its efficiency, we present a stochastic variant of DCM by introducing a stochastic resolution-of-identity (sRI) technique, which decomposes the essential four-index intermediates. The resulting sRI-DCM scheme only involves one O(N^6) step, while all other steps do not exceed O(N^4) at each recursion, and reliably reproduces the results of conventional DCM. Our sRI-DCM achieves an overall experimental scaling of O(N^{4.46}) for series hydrogen dimer chains, demonstrating that it is attractive and practical for large systems containing hundreds of electrons.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种随机版本的Doubles Connected Moments (DCM)方法，通过引入随机分辨率恒等式(sRI)技术，将计算从O(N^6)降低到O(N^{4.46})，在保持精度的同时显著提升了计算大分子系统的效率。
AI.motivation: DCM方法虽然精度优于CCSD，但其O(N^6)的计算复杂度限制了在大体系中的应用，因此需要进一步提高计算效率。
AI.method: 在DCM方法中引入随机分辨率恒等式(sRI)技术，将关键的四个指数中间体进行分解，使得仅需一步O(N^6)操作，其余递归步骤不超过O(N^4)。
AI.result: sRI-DCM在氢二聚体链系列上实现了O(N^{4.46})的实验标度，并能可靠地复现传统DCM的计算结果。
AI.conclusion: sRI-DCM是一种有吸引力的实用方法，适用于包含数百个电子的大型系统。

title: Nonequilibrium Theory for Molecular Machine Design
summary: Modeling the dynamical flows on networks of biomolecular machines often entails computing node populations and edge fluxes with Master Equations and correlating machine performance with entropy production. But this alone is not sufficient for design, optimization and evolution because it doesn't treat cost-benefit tradeoffs, or small-system misflows (backsteps, futile cycles, ineffective actions), or differential properties for flow design. Here we develop CFT Design, based on the recently developed Caliber Force Theory (CFT). We apply it to: designing faster molecular motors through ``traffic control''; optimizing speed, energy, and accuracy in kinetic proofreaders; and designing better enzyme inhibitors. CFT Design provides a general framework for optimizing nonequilibrium flow networks.

AI.tldr: 本文基于Caliber Force Theory (CFT)开发了CFT Design框架，用于优化非平衡流网络，并将其应用于设计更快的分子马达、优化动力学校对器的速度/能量/精度，以及设计更好的酶抑制剂。
AI.motivation: 传统的Master Equation方法虽能计算节点群体和边通量，但无法处理成本-收益权衡、小系统错误流（如回退、无效循环）以及用于流设计的微分属性，不足以支持设计、优化和进化。
AI.method: 基于Caliber Force Theory (CFT) 开发CFT Design框架，通过"交通管制"策略优化非平衡流网络。
AI.result: 成功应用于设计更快分子马达、优化动力学校对器的速度/能量/精度权衡，以及设计更好的酶抑制剂。
AI.conclusion: CFT Design提供了一个通用的非平衡流网络优化框架，弥补了传统方法的不足。

title: Constitutive Priors for Inverse Design
summary: This work introduces an end-to-end framework for inverse design of elastic networks directly in the space of constitutive behaviors. A constitutive prior is constructed from noisy stress-strain data using a latent representation that defines a manifold of admissible material laws while enforcing thermodynamic consistency. The inverse problem is formulated as a PDE-constrained optimization problem over latent constitutive variables that parameterize spatially varying material behavior. To improve robustness in the resulting nonconvex optimization, a homotopy-based continuation strategy is introduced using intermediate target point clouds generated through affine registration. Geometry matching is performed using the Chamfer distance, enabling optimization without requiring mesh correspondence between the target and reference configurations. To account for manufacturing constraints limiting abrupt spatial variation in material properties, the framework additionally incorporates a neural-network-based smoothness prior together with a graph-based smoothness metric. The proposed approach is demonstrated on several inverse design problems for elastic networks and compared against alternative optimization strategies.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种端到端的弹性网络逆设计框架，在材料本构行为空间中直接进行优化，利用潜变量表示、同伦连续策略和光滑先验，实现无需网格对应的几何匹配和制造约束下的逆设计。
AI.motivation: 现有弹性网络逆设计方法通常受限于本构空间的高维性、优化非凸性导致的鲁棒性问题，以及制造约束（如材料属性的空间平滑性）难以纳入优化过程，缺乏一个端到端的统一框架。
AI.method: 1) 构建基于潜变量表示的本构先验（从含噪应力-应变数据学习，保证热力学一致性）；2) PDE约束优化，优化潜变量以参数化空间变化的材料行为；3) 同伦连续策略（通过仿射配准生成中间目标点云）提高非凸优化鲁棒性；4) 使用Chamfer距离进行几何匹配，无需网格对应；5) 引入神经网络光滑先验和图基光滑度量，约束材料属性的空间变化。
AI.result: 在多个弹性网络逆设计问题上验证了该框架的有效性，并与多种替代优化策略进行了对比，展示了更好的鲁棒性和设计质量。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的框架能够有效地在材料本构行为空间中直接进行逆设计，同时兼顾热力学一致性、制造约束和几何匹配的灵活性，为弹性网络的设计提供了一种端到端的解决方案。

title: Freestanding GdBa2Cu3O7 Thin Films via Optimized Buffer Layer Design: Preserving Superconducting Properties
summary: Freestanding GdBa2Cu3O7 (GdBCO) superconducting thin films were fabricated using a water-soluble Sr3Al2O6 (SAO) sacrificial layer in combination with thermal release tape. An amorphous Al2O3 capping layer was introduced to suppress crack formation during the lift-off process. The influence of buffer-layer design inserted between the GdBCO and SAO layers was systematically investigated with respect to structural integrity and superconducting properties after lift-off. A LaAlO3/SrTiO3 bilayer buffer was found to be essential for maintaining epitaxial growth and a superconducting transition temperature (Tc) of approximately 92 K after lift-off, comparable to that of the as-grown films. In contrast, a reversed SrTiO3/LaAlO3 bilayer and single-layer buffer structures led to a suppression of Tc, highlighting the critical role of stacking sequence. These results demonstrate that optimization of the buffer-layer design is a key factor for realizing high-quality freestanding GdBCO films while maintaining their superconducting characteristics.

AI.tldr: 本文通过水溶性Sr3Al2O6牺牲层结合热释放胶带成功制备了自支撑GdBCO超导薄膜，发现LaAlO3/SrTiO3双层缓冲层对于维持外延生长和高温超导特性（Tc~92K）至关重要，而缓冲层堆叠顺序的优化是保证高质量自支撑超导薄膜的关键。
AI.motivation: 制备高质量的自支撑高温超导薄膜，并研究缓冲层设计对薄膜结构完整性和超导性能的影响，以实现超导特性的保持。
AI.method: 使用水溶性SAO牺牲层结合热释放胶带剥离GdBCO薄膜，引入非晶Al2O3覆盖层抑制裂纹，系统比较了不同缓冲层结构（LaAlO3/SrTiO3双层、反序双层及单层）的影响。
AI.result: LaAlO3/SrTiO3双层缓冲层成功维持了外延生长和Tc~92K，而反序SrTiO3/LaAlO3双层及单层缓冲层导致Tc降低。
AI.conclusion: 优化缓冲层的设计和堆叠顺序是实现高质量自支撑GdBCO超导薄膜的关键因素。

title: Boundary-dependent topological degeneracy in an Ising chain
summary: The topological degeneracy is a characteristic of quantum phase diagram in an Ising chain with transverse field. We revisit the phase diagram at nonzero temperature of an Ising chain with two types of open boundary conditions. In this work, we focus on an alternative boundary condition that not only removes the coupling between the two end sites but also eliminates the transverse field on them. We show that such a system can be exactly mapped onto two independent Kitaev chains, where spinless fermions correspond to domain-wall excitations. This results in a switch in the existence of the topological Kramers-like degeneracy in the phase diagram. The underlying mechanism is analyzed within the Majorana representation, which indicates that such a switch arises from the gauge dependence of the winding number in an SSH chain. The manifestation of bulk-boundary correspondence at nonzero temperature is demonstrated by numerical simulations on finite-size systems. This finding provides insight into the quantum spin chain.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了具有替代开放边界条件的横场Ising链在非零温度下的相图，发现边界条件的改变会导致拓扑Kramers简并的存在性发生切换，并通过精确映射到Kitaev链和Majorana表示分析了其机制。
AI.motivation: 拓扑简并性是横场Ising链量子相图的重要特征，但不同边界条件下非零温度相图的行为尚不清楚，尤其是替代边界条件如何影响拓扑简并的存在性。
AI.method: 通过精确映射将系统转化为两个独立的Kitaev链，其中自旋无费米子对应畴壁激发；利用Majorana表示分析SSH链中缠绕数的规范依赖性；对有限尺寸系统进行数值模拟以展示体边对应关系。
AI.result: 替代边界条件（移除两端耦合及横向场）导致拓扑Kramers简并在相图中的存在性发生切换；这种切换源于SSH链中缠绕数的规范依赖性。
AI.conclusion: 该发现揭示了边界条件对量子自旋链拓扑性质的关键影响，为理解量子自旋链的拓扑相提供了新见解。

title: Antiferro-Chiral Phonons in $\mathcal{P}\mathcal{T}$-Symmetric Antiferromagnets
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures, 1 table, Supplemental Material added as Ancillary file
summary: Chiral phonons provide a route to couple lattice motion to magnetic order, but conventional chiral phonons carry a net angular momentum and thus couple naturally to net magnetization rather than to compensated Néel order. Here we show that $\mathcal{P}\mathcal{T}$-symmetric antiferromagnets can host \emph{antiferro-chiral phonons} (AFCPs): phonon modes with vanishing total angular momentum but finite sublattice-staggered angular momentum. Symmetry enforces this distinction because $\mathcal{P}\mathcal{T}$ forbids a net phonon angular momentum while allowing counter-rotating local motion on inversion-related sublattices. AFCPs arise from a Néel-vector-locked coupling between Raman and infrared-active phonons. The coupling is odd under both $\mathcal{P}$ and $\mathcal{T}$ while preserving their product. Through this hybridization, the normal modes acquire both Raman and infrared character and carry a sublattice-staggered phonon angular momentum that acts as a conjugate field to the Néel vector. This coupling is microscopically generated by the molecular Berry curvature, which is demonstrated in a prototype lattice model. Reversing the Néel vector reverses the staggered phonon chirality. These results indicate AFCPs as probes of antiferromagnetic order and suggest coherent phonon excitation as a route to its dynamical control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在PT对称反铁磁体中存在“反铁手性声子”(AFCPs)，这种声子模式总角动量为零但具有交错晶格角动量，通过拉曼与红外活性声子的杂化与奈尔矢量耦合，可用于反铁磁序的探测和动力学控制。
AI.motivation: 传统手性声子携带净角动量，只能耦合净磁化强度，无法与补偿性的奈尔序（反铁磁序）耦合。作者希望找到一种能直接与反铁磁序相互作用的声子模式。
AI.method: 基于对称性分析，作者论证PT对称反铁磁体可存在总角动量为零但交错角动量非零的反铁手性声子。该声子通过拉曼与红外活性声子的奈尔矢量锁定耦合产生，并用分子贝里曲率在原型晶格模型中展示了其微观机制。
AI.result: 反铁手性声子具有零净角动量但有限交错角动量；奈尔矢量反转会反转交错手性；该耦合由分子贝里曲率微观产生。
AI.conclusion: 反铁手性声子可作为反铁磁序的探针，并通过相干声子激发为其动力学控制提供新途径。

title: The superite phase and phase transition inducing multiscale solidification microstructures and segregations in steels
summary: Based on classical concept, solidification of alloys is a direct transition from liquid phase to solid phase, by which dendrites and dendritic segregation are produced. Through in-situ and real time morphology observation and XRD test during solidification of three steels, a new superite phase featured as statistically oriented tiny structures was identified, and a general liquid-superite-solid phase transformation process is revealed. In the early solidification stage, the liquid alloys transit to dendrites composed of superite phase. Initiated from the boundaries of dendritic arms or dendrite grains, the superite phase transits to austenite grains within an initial dendritic arm, and expels solute elements to the residual superite phase. Mixed multi-phase microstructures are subsequently produced from the residual enriched superite phase. Here, although three steels exhibit different phase proportion and phase constitution in the superite-solid transition, they all follow above general transition mode. Multiscale microstructures and segregations are produced in the transition from superite to solid. These new findings change the basic understanding about the solidification of alloys, rediscover the formation mechanism on segregations and multiscale solidification microstructures, including dendrite pattern, solid dendritic arm, dendritic segregation, the mixed multi-phase microstructures, eutectic, inclusions and precipitate. These new findings are also crucial to the control of solidification microstructures and segregation in metals.

AI.tldr: 本文通过三种钢的原位实时凝固观察和XRD测试，发现了一种名为"superite"的新相，揭示了液态→superite相→固相的相变过程，改变了传统合金凝固理论，并解释了枝晶、偏析等多尺度微观结构的形成机制。
AI.motivation: 传统理论认为合金凝固是液相直接转变为固相，产生枝晶和枝晶偏析。作者通过实验发现存在一种中间相"superite"，旨在揭示这一新的相变过程及其对微观结构和偏析形成的影响。
AI.method: 对三种钢进行原位实时形貌观察和XRD测试，追踪凝固过程中的相变行为。
AI.result: 发现了统计取向的微小结构组成的superite相；揭示了液相→superite→固相的一般转变模式；superite在枝晶臂边界或枝晶粒边界转变为奥氏体，并将溶质元素排出到残余superite中；三种钢虽相比例和相组成不同，但均遵循该转变模式。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现改变了合金凝固的基本认识，重新揭示了偏析和多尺度凝固微观结构（包括枝晶形态、枝晶臂、枝晶偏析、混合多相组织、共晶、夹杂物和析出相）的形成机制，对控制金属凝固组织和偏析具有重要意义。

title: Post-pulse dipole instability in adiabatic TDDFT: fact or artifact?
summary: Recent real-time TDDFT calculations have reported an unexpected delayed growth of molecular dipole oscillations some time after an extreme-ultraviolet (XUV) pulse is applied. We show that numerical and analytical arguments suggest that this instability is an artifact of an incorrect non-linearity introduced by the computational approach: Propagation with an adiabatic exchange-correlation approximation within the time-dependent Kohn-Sham equations of time-dependent density functional theory (TDDFT) tends to amplify initially small and pure sinusoidal oscillations in a system. On the other hand, when this same adiabatic approximation is used within the recent response-reformulated RR-TDDFT,the instability is absent. The absorbing boundary condition plays a crucial role consistent with our argument. We demonstrate this explicitly on the N2 molecule subject to an XUV pulse, with a range of adiabatic functionals.

AI.tldr: 近期实时TDDFT计算中报告的分子偶极振荡延迟增长现象，实际上是使用绝热交换关联近似的计算方法引入的人为伪影，而非真实的物理效应。
AI.motivation: 解释和澄清实时TDDFT计算中出现的意外偶极振荡延迟增长现象，判断其是否为真实物理效应或计算伪影。
AI.method: 通过数值与解析分析，对比标准实时TDDFT（使用绝热交换关联近似）与响应重整化RR-TDDFT两种计算方法，并在N₂分子上使用多种绝热泛函进行XUV脉冲激发测试。
AI.result: 标准实时TDDFT中，绝热交换关联近似会人为放大原本微小纯净的正弦振荡，导致延迟增长伪影；而RR-TDDFT中该伪影消失。吸收边界条件对这一现象有关键影响。
AI.conclusion: 延迟偶极振荡增长是绝热近似在实时TDDFT中引入的计算伪影，而非真实物理现象；RR-TDDFT可以有效避免该问题。

title: Sensitivity Analysis in the Face of Rare Events
summary: Molecular motors and other complex nonequilibrium systems are controlled by large sets of design parameters, and optimizing those parameters requires computing sensitivities -- derivatives of dynamical observables with respect to the parameters. When the system's dynamics involves rare events, both the observable and its sensitivity are difficult to estimate from direct simulation. We present a practical computational pipeline that addresses both challenges by combining importance sampling with a Markov state model (MSM). The MSM separately captures the slow, rare-event dynamics and the fast, local dynamics, and the chain rule connects those two pieces to yield an efficient sensitivity estimator. An iterative reweighting procedure based on the RiteWeight algorithm substantially reduces approximation errors from the MSM coarse-graining. We validate the approach on diffusion in the Müller-Brown potential, where the sensitivity of a transition rate to landscape parameters can be computed exactly. We then use sensitivies to optimize the directional bias of a particle-based model of a catalysis-driven molecular motor.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合重要性采样与马尔可夫状态模型(MSM)的实用计算流程，用于高效估计复杂非平衡系统（如分子马达）中稀有事件动力学的灵敏度（可观测量的导数），并通过迭代重加权减少粗粒化误差，在Müller-Brown势和分子马达模型中验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 分子马达等复杂非平衡系统受大量设计参数控制，优化这些参数需要计算灵敏度（动力学可观测量对参数的导数）。然而，当系统动力学涉及稀有事件时，直接模拟难以估计可观测量及其灵敏度，亟需一种高效的实用计算方法。
AI.method: 将重要性采样（稀有事件采样）与马尔可夫状态模型(MSM)相结合：MSM分别捕获慢速稀有事件动力学和快速局部动力学，通过链式法则将两者连接得到高效的灵敏度估计器；并采用基于RiteWeight算法的迭代重加权流程，显著减少MSM粗粒化带来的近似误差。
AI.result: 在Müller-Brown势的扩散过程中验证了方法有效性，该场景下跃迁速率对势能景观参数的灵敏度可精确计算；随后将方法应用于催化驱动分子马达模型中，成功优化了方向偏置参数。
AI.conclusion: 该计算流程为涉及稀有事件的复杂非平衡系统（如分子马达）的参数优化提供了一种实用且高效的灵敏度估计方案，通过结合重要性采样、MSM和迭代重加权，克服了直接模拟的瓶颈。

title: Neural-ISAM: A hybrid in-situ machine learning approach for complex manifold-based combustion models in LES of turbulent flames
summary: Manifold-based combustion models decrease the cost of turbulent combustion simulations by projecting the thermochemical state onto a lower-dimensional manifold, allowing the thermochemical state to be computed separately from the flow solver. The solutions to the manifold equations have traditionally been precomputed and pretabulated, but this results in large memory requirements and significant precomputation cost even for simple models. One approach to alleviate the memory requirements is to use In-Situ Adaptive Manifolds (ISAM), which only stores solutions that are encountered during a simulation in a database built with In-Situ Adaptive Tabulation (ISAT). Even with ISAM, as the manifold complexity increases, the memory requirements can still grow too large. Another approach to reduce memory of these databases are machine learning methods, for they represent functions in a highly memory-compact manner. However, current implementations of these methods require the pregeneration of training datasets with little knowledge of the states present in a simulation. This work develops the Neural In-Situ Adaptive Manifolds (Neural-ISAM) method, which is designed to address the drawbacks of both adaptive tabulation and machine learning methods, and leverage their benefits by coupling neural networks to manifold databases on-the-fly. ISAM databases are built via ISAT, which stores the manifold solutions in a binary tree, and Neural-ISAM periodically searches this tree to identify regions that can be pruned. Neural networks are trained on the candidate regions, and these portions of the binary tree are then replaced by the trained neural network, reducing the memory requirements of the database. Neural-ISAM memory usage, computational performance, and accuracy is evaluated in LES of two turbulent flames with increasing manifold model complexity: Sandia Flame D and the Sandia Sooting flame.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Neural-ISAM方法，通过将神经网络与自适应流形数据库在线耦合，在湍流燃烧模拟中替代传统预计算表格，既降低了存储需求，又无需预先生成训练数据，在LES火焰模拟中验证了其内存、计算效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统流形燃烧模型需要预计算和预建表，导致存储需求大且预计算成本高；ISAM虽能自适应建库，但复杂度增加时内存仍过大；机器学习方法虽紧凑但需预先生成训练集，缺乏对模拟状态的先验知识。
AI.method: Neural-ISAM方法在ISAM数据库（基于ISAT二叉树的解存储）基础上，定期搜索树中可剪枝的区域，用神经网络在线训练替代这些区域的存储，从而降低内存占用。
AI.result: 在Sandia Flame D和Sandia Sooting火焰的LES模拟中，评估了该方法在不同流形复杂度下的内存使用、计算性能和精度表现。
AI.conclusion: Neural-ISAM结合了自适应制表与机器学习的优势，既无需预训练数据集，又能通过神经网络压缩存储，有效缓解了流形数据库的内存瓶颈问题。

title: Anomalous and diode Josephson effect in junctions with inhomogeneous ferromagnetic barrier and interfacial Rashba spin-orbit coupling
summary: We theoretically investigate the anomalous and diode Josephson effects in planar two-dimensional Josephson junctions with arbitrarily oriented exchange fields in two ferromagnets within the barrier, and spin-orbit coupling at the superconductor/ferromagnet interfaces, where the superconducting electrodes can have $s$-wave or arbitrarily oriented $d$-wave order parameter lobes. We perform a systematic symmetry analysis of the junction Hamiltonian and identify the minimal conditions for breaking time-reversal and space-inversion symmetries, which are required for the emergence of anomalous and diode Josephson effects. We classify the junctions into three classes, with particular attention to those between $d_{x^2-y^2}$ and $d_{xy}$ oriented superconductors. Our symmetry analysis is supported by numerical calculations of the current-phase relation (CPR) obtained using a generalized Furusaki-Tsukada (F-T) approach. By tuning the directions of exchange fields in the ferromagnets, Rashba SOC at the interfaces and superconducting order parameter orientations, nonreciprocity can be enhanced by more than 40\%. We further analyze the phase-dependent Andreev bound states (ABS) spectrum and their contribution to charge transport, as well as their signatures in the nonreciprocal transport characteristics. By comparing the current carried by ABS with that obtained using the F-T technique, we find that the contribution from continuum states above the gap becomes pronounced in presence of zero energy crossings in the ABS spectrum, and in junctions with $d$-wave superconducting electrodes due to the narrower superconducting gap, which may become closed. In the nonreciprocal regime, the ABS spectra show an asymmetric profile with respect to phase inversion, indicating the presence of a finite current at zero phase difference and unequal critical currents in opposite directions.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了具有任意取向交换场和自旋轨道耦合的二维约瑟夫森结中的异常和二极管约瑟夫森效应，通过对称性分析和数值计算揭示了非互易性增强机制，并分析了Andreev束缚态对输运的贡献。
AI.motivation: 理解并调控超导结中的非互易输运现象，探索打破时间反演和空间反演对称性的最小条件，以实现高效的超导二极管效应。
AI.method: 采用对称性分析结合广义Furusaki-Tsukada方法的数值计算，求解电流-相位关系，并分析Andreev束缚态谱对输运的贡献。
AI.result: 通过调节铁磁体中交换场方向、界面Rashba自旋轨道耦合以及超导序参量取向，非互易性可提升40%以上；d波超导结中连续谱贡献显著，零能穿越导致不对称ABS谱。
AI.conclusion: 建立了异常和二极管约瑟夫森效应的系统分类框架，揭示了通过多参数协同调控优化非互易输运的可行路径。

title: Spin-charge separation in two-leg t-J ladders
summary: Spin-charge separation is a hallmark of one-dimensional fermionic systems, yet its realization in higher dimensions remains an open question. To address this issue, we investigate a two-leg t-J ladder using the density matrix renormalization group (DMRG) method and its time-dependent extension. By analyzing ground-state correlations and single-particle removal spectra, we systematically examine the effects of plaquette diagonal hopping, spin exchange, and hole doping. Within appropriate parameter regimes, these factors drive the system from the well-known Luther Emery phase, with gapped spin and gapless charge modes, into a Luttinger liquid phase characterized by gapless spin and charge excitations, where signatures of spin-charge separation emerge. In combination with previous studies using exact diagonalization, our results provide evidence that spin-charge separation may persist in wider ladder systems.

AI.tldr: 本文利用DMRG方法研究两腿t-J梯子模型，发现通过调节plaquette对角跳跃、自旋交换和空穴掺杂，系统可从Luther Emery相（自旋能隙、电荷无能隙）转变为Luttinger液体相（自旋和电荷均无能隙），出现自旋-电荷分离迹象，并暗示该现象可能在更宽梯子系统中存在。
AI.motivation: 自旋-电荷分离是一维费米子系统的标志性现象，但在更高维度中是否可以实现仍是一个悬而未决的问题。本文旨在探究在准一维的梯子系统中能否实现自旋-电荷分离。
AI.method: 采用密度矩阵重正化群（DMRG）方法及其含时扩展，对两腿t-J梯子模型进行数值模拟，分析基态关联函数和单粒子移除谱，系统研究plaquette对角跳跃、自旋交换和空穴掺杂等参数的影响。
AI.result: 在适当的参数区间内，系统从具有自旋能隙和电荷无能隙的Luther Emery相转变为自旋和电荷均无能隙的Luttinger液体相，出现了自旋-电荷分离的特征信号。
AI.conclusion: 结合先前精确对角化研究，本文结果为自旋-电荷分离可能在更宽梯子系统中持续存在提供了证据。

title: Fokker--Planck framework for stochastic octupole moment dynamics in chiral antiferromagnet Mn3Sn
summary: We develop a reduced stochastic framework for thermally assisted octupole moment dynamics in Mn3Sn by combining the reduced Landau--Lifshitz--Gilbert (LLG) equation with the Fokker--Planck formalism. The reduced model is benchmarked against the complete three-sublattice octupole dynamics and is shown to capture the essential switching behavior with good accuracy. We then derive the corresponding Fokker--Planck equation, which is implemented and solved via a CUDA-accelerated solver. The analysis shows that the octupole dynamics are highly sensitive to the out-of-plane grid resolution because ultrafast rotation of the octupole is controlled by its very small deviations from the basal plane. The solver is validated against Monte Carlo simulations through equilibrium distributions, relaxation trajectories, and switching times. Finally, we apply the method to thermally assisted field-driven switching and demonstrate efficient access to ultra-low error probabilities beyond the practical reach of direct Monte Carlo simulations.

AI.tldr: 本文针对Mn3Sn中的热辅助八极矩动力学，开发了一种约化随机框架，将约化LLG方程与Fokker-Planck形式相结合，并通过CUDA加速求解器高效模拟了超低错误概率下的开关行为。
AI.motivation: 传统基于完整三子格八极矩动力学的蒙特卡洛模拟在计算超低错误概率时效率极低，需要一种更高效的约化框架来研究Mn3Sn中热辅助八极矩的开关动力学。
AI.method: 将约化Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert方程与Fokker-Planck形式相结合，构建约化随机框架；利用CUDA加速求解Fokker-Planck方程；通过平衡分布、弛豫轨迹和开关时间等指标与蒙特卡洛模拟进行交叉验证。
AI.result: 约化模型能够以良好精度捕捉八极矩开关行为；八极矩动力学对离面网格分辨率高度敏感；CUDA加速求解器在超低错误概率区域效率远超直接蒙特卡洛模拟。
AI.conclusion: 该约化随机框架为Mn3Sn热辅助八极矩开关提供了一种高效且准确的计算方法，能够有效研究实际工程中关心的超低错误概率区域。

title: Multi-Fidelity Computational Screening of High-Entropy MBenes for CO$_2$ Electroreduction
summary: High-entropy MBenes (HE-MBenes) represent a promising, unexplored class of 2D materials for electrocatalysis. In this work, we present a systematic computational screening of 56 equiatomic quinary HE-MBene compositions from the {Ti, V, Cr, Mo, Nb, Ta, Zr, Hf} pool for CO$_2$ adsorption and electroreduction. Using the Monte Carlo Special Quasirandom Structure (MCSQS) algorithm, we generated disordered M$_1B_1$-type supercells and assessed structural stability via DFT (PBE+D3) in VASP. Of the 56 candidates, 55 passed relaxation, with 45 exhibiting negative formation energies, confirming thermodynamic stability. To efficiently screen CO$_2$ adsorption across disordered surfaces, we developed a machine-learning interatomic potential (MLIP) using the MACE architecture. Fine-tuned on our DFT dataset, the model achieved energy RMSEs of 3.49 and 3.0 meV/atom for adsorbed and pristine sets, respectively. Active sites were identified via PDOS analysis, matching metal d-orbital signatures with CO$_2$ molecular orbitals. The rate-determining step of the CO$_2$-to-CO pathway was evaluated using the computational hydrogen electrode (CHE) model. Short-time structural integrity was assessed via AIMD at 500 K over 2.5 ps; phonon-based stability remains a priority for future work. Our results establish an integrated DFT-MLIP-AIMD framework for the rational design of high-entropy 2D materials tailored for CO$_2$ conversion.

AI.tldr: 本文通过DFT+MLIP+AIMD集成框架，系统筛选了56种五元高熵MBene材料用于CO₂电还原，发现45种具有热力学稳定性，并开发了高精度机器学习势函数以加速表面吸附筛选。
AI.motivation: 高熵MBenes作为新兴二维材料在电催化领域极具潜力，但缺乏系统性研究。作者旨在通过计算筛选，寻找适合CO₂吸附与电还原的高熵MBene候选材料。
AI.method: 从8种过渡金属池中构建56种等原子五元HE-MBene；使用MCSQS算法生成无序超胞；DFT (PBE+D3)计算结构稳定性；开发MACE架构的机器学习原子间势能（MLIP）加速CO₂吸附筛选；PDOS分析识别活性位点；CHE模型评估CO₂-to-CO路径的决速步；AIMD（500 K, 2.5 ps）评估短时结构稳定性。
AI.result: 55种候选通过结构弛豫，45种形成能为负（热力学稳定）；MLIP在吸附集和纯净集上的能量RMSE分别为3.49和3.0 meV/atom；成功识别了金属d轨道与CO₂分子轨道的匹配活性位点。
AI.conclusion: 建立了DFT-MLIP-AIMD集成计算框架，为高熵二维材料的设计提供了高效筛选策略，推动CO₂电还原催化剂的理性设计。

title: Detection Defines Dephasing in Two-Dimensional Electronic Spectroscopy of Materials: Coherent Field Emission versus Incoherent Population Observables
