In particular, the lifetime of the lowest resonance increases from 39 fs in isolated thymine to 110 fs in the thymine(H2O)3 cluster. Detailed analysis reveals that the observed resonance shifts arise from competing contributions involving hydrogen bonding, electrostatic interactions, microsolvation-induced geometric distortion, and finite-basis-set effects. Ghost-atom calculations demonstrate that diffuse basis functions associated with nearby water molecules contribute appreciably to the apparent stabilization, while explicit inclusion of water molecules leads to genuine physical stabilization of the resonance states. Furthermore, calculations on multiple conformers of the monohydrated cluster show that resonance positions and lifetimes depend strongly on the local hydrogen-bonding arrangement and microsolvation geometry. These findings demonstrate that resonance stabilization in microhydrated nucleobases is governed by a subtle interplay between geometry, basis-set effects, and intermolecular interactions.

AI.tldr: 研究利用Resonance via Padé方法结合DLPNO-EA-EOM-CCSD，发现水合作用对胸腺嘧啶π*形状共振的稳定化及寿命延长受氢键、静电、几何畸变和基组效应的复杂竞争影响。
AI.motivation: 探究微水合效应对核酸碱基低能形状共振的影响机制，特别是水合如何改变共振位置和寿命，这对于理解DNA辐射损伤的早期过程至关重要。
AI.method: 采用Resonance via Padé方法结合DLPNO-EA-EOM-CCSD，辅以projected CAP-EA-EOM-CCSD进行基准验证，通过不同水合度（单体至三水合物）及多种构象的对比分析，结合鬼原子计算分离基组效应。
AI.result: 1π*和2π*共振随水合稳定化且寿命显著增加（最低共振寿命从39 fs增至110 fs）；3π*行为更复杂。鬼原子计算显示水分子弥散基函数的虚假贡献，而真实水合效应是物理稳定的；共振性质强烈依赖局部氢键几何。
AI.conclusion: 微水合核酸碱基的共振稳定化由几何结构、基组效应和分子间相互作用的微妙平衡共同决定，局部氢键排列对共振性质有显著调控作用。

title: Collective Alignment in LLM Multi-Agent Systems: Disentangling Bias from Cooperation via Statistical Physics
summary: We investigate the emergent collective dynamics of LLM-based multi-agent systems on a 2D square lattice and present a model-agnostic statistical-physics method to disentangle social conformity from intrinsic bias, compute critical exponents, and probe the collective behavior and possible phase transitions of multi-agent systems. In our framework, each node of an $L\!\times\!L$ lattice hosts an identical LLM agent holding a binary state ($+1$/$-1$, mapped to yes/no) and updating it by querying the model conditioned on the four nearest-neighbor states. The sampler temperature $T$ serves as the sole control parameter. Across three open-weight models (llama3.1:8b, phi4-mini:3.8b, mistral:7b), we measure magnetization and susceptibility under a global-flip protocol designed to probe $\mathbb{Z}_2$ symmetry. All models display temperature-driven order-disorder crossovers and susceptibility peaks; finite-size scaling on even-$L$ lattices yields effective exponents $γ/ν$ whose values are model-dependent, close to but incompatible with the 2D Ising universality class ($γ/ν=7/4$). Our method enables the extraction of effective $β$-weighted couplings $\tilde{J}(T)$ and fields $\tilde{h}(T)$, which serve as a measure of social conformity and intrinsic bias. In the models we analyzed, we found that collective alignment is dominated by an intrinsic bias ($\tilde{h}\gg\tilde{J}$) rather than by cooperative neighbor coupling, producing field-driven crossovers instead of genuine phase transitions. These effective parameters vary qualitatively across models, providing compact collective-behavior fingerprints for LLM agents and a quantitative diagnostic for the reliability of multi-agent consensus and collective alignment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个统计物理方法，分析基于LLM的多智能体系统在二维网格上的集体动力学，发现智能体的集体对齐主要受内在偏见驱动，而非社会从众行为，且相变行为不同于2D Ising模型。
AI.motivation: 理解LLM多智能体系统中的集体行为是否源于社会从众（邻居交互）还是内在偏见（模型固有倾向），并判断是否存在真正的相变现象。
AI.method: 在L×L网格上放置相同LLM智能体（二元状态），通过查询模型更新状态（依赖四个最近邻），以采样温度T为控制参数。用全局翻转协议测量磁化率和磁化强度，进行有限尺寸标度分析，提取有效耦合参数J̃(T)和场h̃(T)分别量化社会从众和内在偏见。
AI.result: 三个开源模型均展现温度驱动的有序-无序交叉和磁化率峰；临界指数γ/ν依赖于模型，接近但不等于2D Ising值7/4；h̃远大于J̃，表明集体对齐由内在偏见主导而非邻居耦合；有效参数在不同模型间定性不同。
AI.conclusion: LLM多智能体系统表现出场驱动的交叉行为而非真正的相变，内在偏见是社会对齐的主要驱动力；该方法可作为LLM智能体集体行为指纹的量化诊断工具。

title: Purcell enhancement in layered InSe on the Mie-resonant silicon nitride waveguide
summary: Hybrid integration of layered van der Waals (vdW) semiconductors with dielectric resonant structures provides an effective approach for controlling excitonic emission dynamics. Here, we demonstrate Purcell-enhanced spontaneous emission from a thin InSe flake integrated with a Mie-resonant Si$_3$N$_4$ waveguide. The structure is designed to spectrally overlap with the InSe photoluminescence band and enhance coupling of excitonic emission to the guided mode. Time-resolved photoluminescence shows a reduction of the excitonic decay time by up to a factor of three relative to planar InSe. The extracted Purcell factors are approximately 3 for out-of-plane excitons and 2.1 for in-plane excitons. These results demonstrate resonator-induced control of excitonic recombination in layered InSe and highlight vdW-dielectric interfaces as a platform for integrated excitonic and quantum photonic devices.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了将层状范德华半导体InSe与Mie共振Si₃N₄波导混合集成，实现了Purcell增强的自发辐射，激子衰减时间最多缩短三倍，面外和面内激子的Purcell因子分别约为3和2.1。
AI.motivation: 将层状范德华半导体与介电共振结构混合集成，以有效控制激子发射动力学。
AI.method: 将InSe薄片集成到Mie共振Si₃N₄波导上，设计结构使其光谱与InSe光致发光带重叠，增强激子发射到导模的耦合，并通过时间分辨光致发光测量激子衰减时间。
AI.result: 激子衰减时间最多缩短三倍；面外激子Purcell因子约3，面内激子约2.1。
AI.conclusion: 成功实现了共振器诱导的InSe激子复合控制，突显了范德华-介电界面作为集成激子与量子光子器件的平台潜力。

title: Stacking-dependent thermoelectric transport in layered Sc_2Si_2Te_6 from first principles
summary: Stacking polymorphism is a common characteristic of van der Waals layered materials and can substantially modify their physical properties. Here, based on first-principles calculations combined with electron and phonon transport theories, we systematically investigate the thermodynamic stability, electronic structure, lattice dynamics, and thermoelectric performance of Sc_2Si_2Te_6 with three high-symmetry stacking sequences, namely, AA, AB, and ABC. We find that the AA- and AB-stacked structures are nearly degenerate in energy with the experimentally reported ABC phase, and that the maximum sliding barrier among these stacking sequences is only about 10~meV/atom, thereby accounting for the stacking faults observed experimentally. These three stacking sequences exhibit distinct electronic structures, with the conduction-band minimum being highly sensitive to the stacking sequence. As a consequence, the conduction-band degeneracies are 12, 2, and 8 for the ABC, AA, and AB stackings, respectively, leading to markedly different electronic transport properties near the band edge. The lattice thermal conductivity is governed primarily by three-phonon scattering, whereas four-phonon scattering provides an additional reduction, particularly in the ABC stacking. Among the three structures, the AB stacking exhibits the lowest lattice thermal conductivity owing to its stronger three-phonon scattering and lower phonon group velocity. As a result, the maximum thermoelectric figure of merit, ZT, is achieved in the ABC structure, followed closely by the AB structure, whereas the AA structure shows a substantially reduced value. These results demonstrate that the stacking sequence exerts a non-negligible influence on the thermoelectric performance of Sc_2Si_2Te_6 and suggest that suppressing the formation of the AA stacking is important for achieving high thermoelectric performance.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算，系统研究了Sc₂Si₂Te₆三种堆叠序列（AA、AB、ABC）的热电性能，发现ABC和AB堆叠具有较高热电优值（ZT），而AA堆叠性能显著降低，表明抑制AA堆叠对提升热电性能至关重要。
AI.motivation: 堆叠多型性在范德华层状材料中普遍存在，可显著改变物理性质，但堆叠序列对Sc₂Si₂Te₆热电性能的影响尚不清楚，需要系统研究。
AI.method: 基于第一性原理计算，结合电子和声子输运理论，系统分析了三种高对称堆叠序列（AA、AB、ABC）的热力学稳定性、电子结构、晶格动力学和热电性能。
AI.result: AA和AB堆叠与实验报道的ABC相能量近简并，最大滑动势垒仅约10 meV/atom。三种堆叠的导带底对堆叠序列高度敏感，简并度分别为ABC（12）、AA（2）、AB（8）。AB堆叠因更强的三声子散射和更低声子群速度而具有最低晶格热导率。ABC结构ZT最高，AB次之，AA显著降低。
AI.conclusion: 堆叠序列对Sc₂Si₂Te₆的热电性能有不可忽视的影响，抑制AA堆叠的形成对于实现高热电性能至关重要。

title: The diffusion equation for non-Markovian Gaussian stochastic processes
summary: We derive the exact evolution equation for the probability density function of particle displacements generated by arbitrary Gaussian velocity processes, when neither Markovianity and nor stationarity are assumed. Starting from the characteristic function of the density of the position, we construct a systematic hierarchy of equations based on Wick's theorem, in which the dynamics is governed by sums of geometrically connected Wick contractions. This approach yields a closed non-Markovian diffusion equation that generalizes the Fokker-Planck description and preserves Gaussianity only in the infinite-order limit.

AI.tldr: 本文推导了任意高斯速度过程下粒子位移概率密度函数的精确演化方程，不假设马尔可夫性或平稳性，通过Wick定理构建了基于几何连通Wick收缩的层次方程，最终得到推广Fokker-Planck的非马尔可夫扩散方程。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散方程通常假设马尔可夫性或平稳性，但实际物理系统中速度过程可能是非马尔可夫、非平稳的高斯过程，缺乏通用的精确描述框架。
AI.method: 从位置密度的特征函数出发，基于Wick定理构建方程层次，通过几何连通Wick收缩求和，推导出封闭的非马尔可夫扩散方程。
AI.result: 得到了推广Fokker-Planck方程的非马尔可夫扩散方程，仅在无穷阶极限下才保持高斯性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为描述非马尔可夫、非平稳高斯速度过程下的粒子扩散提供了通用理论框架，推广了经典Fokker-Planck描述。

title: Spin Seebeck effect in magnetic junctions with a compensated ferrimagnet
summary: Compensated ferrimagnets enable ferromagnet-like spin transport without net magnetization. We study the spin Seebeck effect in a compensated ferrimagnet/normal-metal junction using a four-sublattice model in which sublattice inequivalence arises from differences in exchange couplings, in contrast to the previously studied anisotropy-based mechanism. Within the nonequilibrium Green's function framework, we show that isotropic magnon splitting generates a robust spin current with a magnitude comparable to that in standard ferromagnetic junctions. We also demonstrate that the spin Seebeck effect vanishes in altermagnet junctions under identical conditions, thereby establishing compensated ferrimagnets as uniquely suited for thermal spin-current generation among magnetically compensated systems. These results provide a theoretical basis for the applications of compensated ferrimagnets with exchange-coupling asymmetry as stray-field-free spin-current sources in spintronic devices.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了补偿铁磁体/普通金属结中的自旋塞贝克效应，基于交换耦合不对称的四子晶格模型，证明各向同性磁子分裂能产生与标准铁磁结相当的稳健自旋流，并发现交替磁体结中该效应消失，从而确立补偿铁磁体在热自旋流产生中的独特优势。
AI.motivation: 补偿铁磁体具有类铁磁自旋输运特性且无净磁化，但其热自旋流产生机制尚不明确，特别是与交换耦合不对称性相关的物理机制有待探索。
AI.method: 采用四子晶格模型，引入交换耦合不对称性（区别于各向异性机制），基于非平衡格林函数框架研究补偿铁磁体/普通金属结中的自旋塞贝克效应。
AI.result: 各向同性磁子分裂可产生与标准铁磁结相当的稳健自旋流；在相同条件下，交替磁体结中自旋塞贝克效应消失。
AI.conclusion: 补偿铁磁体凭借交换耦合不对称性，在磁性补偿系统中具有独特的热自旋流产生能力，可作为无杂散场自旋流源应用于自旋电子学器件。

title: Molecular Nitrogen Formation in Nitrogen-Implanted (100) $β-Ga_2O_3$ Revealed by Temperature-Dependent $N$ $K$-edge XANES
summary: The realization of $p$-type doping in wide-band-gap oxide semiconductors remains a major challenge, particularly in $β-Ga_2O_3$ where nitrogen has long been considered a potential acceptor dopant but has consistently failed to produce hole conductivity. Here we investigate the microscopic configuration of implanted nitrogen in (100) $β-Ga_2O_3$ using temperature-dependent $N$ $K$-edge x-ray absorption spectroscopy. The spectra reveal a pronounced $π^*$ resonance characteristic of molecular nitrogen, which becomes increasingly dominant upon thermal annealing. First-principles calculations and multiple-scattering simulations reveal a pronounced tendency for nitrogen atoms to form $N-N$ bonded configurations in the $Ga_2O_3$ matrix, particularly in defect-rich environments created by ion implantation, reproducing the characteristic spectral features observed in the $N$ $K$-edge XANES spectra. Structural analysis further indicates that implantation induces a defect-rich near-surface layer with local $β$-to-$γ$-like structural motifs, highlighting the strongly nonequilibrium structural environment in which nitrogen incorporation occurs. Reported results show that implanted nitrogen preferentially forms molecular $N_2$-like configurations rather than substitutional acceptors. Our results provide a microscopic explanation for the long-standing failure of nitrogen acceptor doping in $β-Ga_2O_3$ and reveal dopant molecularization as a previously overlooked pathway for impurity incorporation under strongly nonequilibrium implantation conditions.

AI.tldr: 氮离子注入β-Ga₂O₃后优先形成N-N分子构型而非替代位受主，解释了长期以来p型掺杂失败的微观机理。
AI.motivation: 宽禁带氧化物半导体的p型掺杂一直是重大挑战，尤其是β-Ga₂O₃中氮被认为是有潜力的受主掺杂剂，但始终未能产生空穴导电性，其根本原因尚不明确。
AI.method: 利用温度依赖的N K边X射线吸收谱（XANES）表征注入氮的微观构型，结合第一性原理计算和多重散射模拟分析氮原子的成键行为及结构环境。
AI.result: 光谱显示分子氮特征π*共振峰随退火增强；计算表明氮趋向形成N-N键合构型；注入导致近表面层缺陷富集并出现β→γ-like结构转变。
AI.conclusion: 注入氮优先形成分子N₂-like构型而非替代位受主，掺杂分子化是强非平衡条件下杂质掺入的先前被忽视的途径，为氮受主掺杂长期失效提供了微观解释。

title: Learning to Rank for Selected Configuration Interaction
summary: The accurate description of electron correlation is a central challenge in computational chemistry, with selected configuration interaction (SCI) emerging as a powerful tool to approach the full CI limit. While recent machine learning (ML) integrations have accelerated determinant selection, existing regression and classification approaches suffer from a fundamental objective-loss mismatch: they evaluate the importance of determinants in isolation without explicitly accounting for their relative importance ranking. Here, we introduce ranking configuration interaction (RCI), a novel ML-supported SCI framework that reframes determinant selection as a pairwise ranking problem. Building upon a Transformer-based architecture to capture complex, non-local orbital dependencies, RCI progressively optimizes the partial ordering of determinants. By doing so, RCI aligns the training objective more closely with the intrinsic ranking nature of SCI. Extensive benchmarks across both plane-wave and Gaussian basis sets, including the molecules N$_2$, CO, H$_2$O, NH$_3$, and C$_2$, demonstrate the substantial efficiency of RCI. Compared to previously reported classification baselines, RCI consistently accelerates convergence-reducing overall computational time by 23% to over 50% depending on the system, and requiring only 55% of the determinant count in representative cases such as N$_2$ and CO. Furthermore, RCI exhibits robust performance and reaches chemical accuracy on the highly challenging iron-sulfur using only 12% of the full CI space. Notably, RCI outperforms recent regression-based SCI methods by delivering either further 15% improvement in accuracy at comparable determinant counts, or 15% gain in compactness at similar accuracy. This pairwise learning-to-rank model provides a lightweight and modular plugin that can be seamlessly incorporated into other supervised-learning frameworks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出排序组态相互作用（RCI）方法，将行列式选择重新定义为成对排序问题，基于Transformer架构捕捉非局域轨道依赖，相较于传统分类和回归方法，在多个分子体系上实现23%-50%以上的计算加速，并仅需55%的行列式数量即可达到同等精度。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习辅助的选组态相互作用（SCI）方法采用回归或分类目标，孤立评估每个行列式的重要性，未能体现其相对重要性排序这一SCI方法的本质，存在目标函数与任务目标之间的失配问题。
AI.method: 将行列式选择重构为成对排序（pairwise ranking）问题，基于Transformer架构捕捉复杂的非局域轨道依赖性，逐步优化行列式的偏序关系，使训练目标与SCI的排序本质更紧密对齐。
AI.result: 在N₂、CO、H₂O、NH₃、C₂等分子上，相比分类基线方法总计算时间减少23%至50%以上；N₂和CO仅需55%的行列式数量；在铁硫簇中仅用12%的Full CI空间即达化学精度；相比回归方法，在同等行列式数量下精度提升15%，或在同等精度下压缩15%的行列式数量。
AI.conclusion: RCI作为一种轻量级模块化插件可无缝集成到其他监督学习框架中，显著提升了SCI方法的效率和精度，为机器学习与量子化学的融合提供了新范式。

title: Susceptible-Infected-Susceptible Model with Mitigation on Scale-Free Networks
summary: We investigate infectious disease spreading on scale-free networks using a heterogeneous mean-field approach applied to the susceptible-infected-susceptible model, incorporating a mitigation factor. Individual heterogeneity is incorporated through a power-law distribution, while a mitigation factor accounts for behavioral responses and external effects that effectively reduce transmission from infected individuals. This mechanism, inspired by Malthus-Verhulst-type constraints, introduces a nonlinear saturation effect that encodes self-limiting dynamics in a tractable way. Analytical results are supported by stochastic simulations. We find that the mitigation factor induces a nontrivial behavior in the probability that a link points to an infected node, which develops a maximum at finite infection rates. In contrast, the overall prevalence remains a monotonically increasing function of the transmission rate. Additionally, the mitigation mechanism leads to an inversion in the dependence of epidemic observables on the degree exponent at sufficiently high transmission rates. While in the standard model smaller exponents yield higher endemic prevalence, in the modified model this trend reverses, with larger exponents producing higher prevalence and increased infection probability along network links.

AI.tldr: 本研究在无标度网络上引入缓解因子（类似Malthus-Verhulst约束）扩展了SIS流行病模型，发现该因子导致感染链接概率出现非平凡的最大值，并在高传播率下反转了度指数与流行程度之间的依赖关系。
AI.motivation: 传统流行病模型未充分纳入行为响应和外部效应导致的传播自限制机制，作者希望通过引入缓解因子来建模这种非线性饱和效应，从而更真实地描述传染病在异质网络上的传播动力学。
AI.method: 采用异质平均场方法在无标度网络（幂律度分布）上分析SIS模型，引入缓解因子模拟传播抑制；通过解析推导与随机模拟相结合验证结果。
AI.result: 缓解因子使感染链接概率在有限感染率处出现最大值，而整体流行率仍单调递增；高传播率下，度指数与流行程度的关系发生反转——原本较小的度指数导致更高流行程度，修正后较大的度指数反而产生更高流行程度和更高的感染链接概率。
AI.conclusion: 行为响应和外生缓解机制能从根本上改变流行病在异质网络上的传播模式，特别是在高传播率下会反转网络异质性对传播的影响方向，这对防控策略设计具有重要启示。

title: Inherent Altermagnetism on regular hyperbolic lattices
summary: Altermagnets are a novel class of magnetic systems characterized by their momentum-dependent spin splitting without net magnetization. In this work, we extend established Euclidean tight-binding models of altermagnets to regular hyperbolic lattices in two spatial dimensions defined on a discretized Poincaré disk. Using hyperbolic crystallography and hyperbolic band theory, we show that the inclusion of next-nearest neighbor hopping is sufficient to induce spin splitting in bipartite hyperbolic lattices. While certain families and special cases of hyperbolic lattices remain antiferromagnetic, we identify an entire family and a special case that show spin splitting in this framework. Hence, altermagnetism is inherent to certain hyperbolic lattices. Since hyperbolic band theory yields a momentum space that is at least four-dimensional, we classify the leading spin-splitting harmonics using four-dimensional atomic orbitals.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在双曲晶格中实现交变磁性（altermagnetism），发现特定家族和特殊情形下存在动量依赖的自旋分裂，无需净磁化，表明双曲晶格可内禀具有交变磁性。
AI.motivation: 将交变磁性的概念从欧几里得晶格推广到双曲晶格（正则双曲晶格），探索非平凡几何中是否也能实现无净磁化的自旋分裂。
AI.method: 利用双曲晶体学和双曲能带理论，在离散化的庞加莱盘上构造正则紧束缚模型，通过加入次近邻跳跃来诱导自旋分裂，并用四维原子轨道分类主导自旋分裂谐波。
AI.result: 发现某些双曲晶格家族和特殊情形在次近邻跳跃下表现出自旋分裂，而其他家族仍保持反铁磁性，证明交变磁性确实内禀存在于特定双曲晶格中。
AI.conclusion: 双曲晶格可作为交变磁性的新平台，其四维动量空间为自旋分裂提供了更丰富的分类机制。

title: Antisymmetric linear transverse magnetization and ferroaxial moments induced by geometry-driven electric field gradients
summary: We theoretically investigate the transverse magnetization and ferroaxial moments induced by electric field gradients arising from the geometry of finite systems. Based on the Kubo formalism and real-time numerical simulations for a finite trapezoidal model, we demonstrate that both quantities are generated under the electric field gradient and are enhanced by tuning the leg inclination, which controls the gradient strength. We further show that the induced transverse magnetization is antisymmetric and linear in the magnetic field; such a response is prohibited by Onsager reciprocity in the absence of an electric field gradient. In addition, we find that the total transverse magnetization scales linearly with the electric field, in contrast to the longitudinal one, which exhibits a quadratic dependence, providing an advantage for experimental observation. Our results establish geometry-induced electric field gradients as a versatile mechanism for realizing and controlling unconventional transverse responses in mesoscopic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文从理论上研究了由有限系统几何结构产生的电场梯度所诱导的横向磁化和铁轴矩。通过梯形模型分析，展示了电场梯度可产生非传统的横向响应，且该响应可通过调节系统几何结构（如腿倾斜度）进行调控。
AI.motivation: 探索几何结构产生的电场梯度作为实现和调控介观系统中非常规横向响应（如横向磁化和铁轴矩）的新机制，并研究其与Onsager reciprocity的关系。
AI.method: 采用Kubo形式论和实时数值模拟，构建有限梯形模型，通过调节腿倾斜度控制电场梯度强度，分析横向磁化和铁轴矩的响应特性。
AI.result: 1) 电场梯度可诱导横向磁化和铁轴矩，且随腿倾斜度增大而增强；2) 诱导的横向磁化是反对称且与磁场线性相关，该响应在无电场梯度时被Onsager互易性禁止；3) 总横向磁化与电场呈线性关系，而纵向磁化为二次关系，有利于实验观测。
AI.conclusion: 几何诱导的电场梯度是实现和调控介观系统中非常规横向响应的通用机制，为相关实验研究提供了理论依据和优势。

title: Giant Rashba Splitting and Enhanced Nonlinear Berry-Phase Responses in Sliding-Tunable vdW MXene Heterostructures
summary:
Chalcogen-terminated van der Waals MXenes (M2CX2; M = Nb, Ta; X = S, Se) provide a robust platform for exploring strong spin-orbit coupling and proximity engineering. To probe their tunability and guide optimization of emergent properties, we systematically examine sister compounds and propose M2CS2/CrBr3 heterostructures that break time-reversal symmetry via proximity exchange coupling, enabling combined intrinsic magnetic and mechanical control.
  First-principles calculations reveal Rashba splitting up to 2.53 eV A and valley-contrasting spin polarization in monolayers. These features drive strong second-order nonlinear responses, with pristine bilayer Ta2CS2 reaching a shift current of |sigma|_max approx 5 A mA/V^2 and Nb2CS2/CrBr3 attaining |D|_max approx 18.44 A. In M2CS2/CrBr3 heterostructures, the ferromagnetic substrate induces a magnetization-reversible proximity exchange field with valley-selective conduction-band renormalization (Delta_val approx 50 meV). Crucially, interfacial geometry, controlled by stacking inversion and lateral sliding, acts as a mechanical knob that continuously tunes the exchange-SOC interplay and bandgap, driving an emergent quantum anomalous Hall phase in the bilayer.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了硫族元素封端的范德华MXenes材料（M2CX2）及其与CrBr3构成的异质结构，发现了高达2.53 eV Å的Rashba劈裂、强非线性光学响应以及可通过界面几何工程调控的量子反常霍尔相。
AI.motivation: 探索强自旋-轨道耦合与邻近效应工程的可调控性，为优化MXenes材料的新兴物性提供指导。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算，系统研究M2CS2单层及M2CS2/CrBr3异质结的电子结构、自旋劈裂、非线性光学响应及拓扑性质。
AI.result: 单层体系中实现了高达2.53 eV Å的Rashba劈裂和谷对比自旋极化；双层Ta2CS2的位移电流达~5 A mA/V²，Nb2CS2/CrBr3的|D|_max达~18.44 Å；CrBr3衬底诱导出可逆磁化的邻近交换场，谷选择性导带重整化约50 meV；界面堆叠和横向滑动可连续调控交换-自旋轨道耦合竞争及带隙，驱动量子反常霍尔相。
AI.conclusion: M2CS2/CrBr3异质结通过邻近交换耦合打破了时间反演对称性，实现了本征磁性与力学控制相结合的多自由度调控，为自旋电子学和拓扑量子器件提供了新材料平台。

title: Physical probes expose and alleviate chemical-environment collapse in molecular representations
summary: Nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) spectroscopy provides an experimental readout of local chemical environments, but its use in molecular representation learning has been constrained by heterogeneous data and incomplete atom-level assignments. Here we construct complementary high-fidelity experimental and computational 13C NMR resources, which reveal a recurrent form of representational collapse: atoms that are equivalent in molecular topology can remain experimentally distinct in their real chemical environments, whereas explicit 3D descriptions are further limited by static conformations in dynamic regimes. To alleviate this bottleneck, we develop CLAIM (Contrastive Learning for Atom-to-molecule Inference of Molecular NMR), a framework that aligns efficient topological molecular inputs with atom-resolved NMR observables. Through hierarchical chemical priors and cross-level contrastive learning, CLAIM restores lost chemical resolution and markedly improves atom-level molecule-spectrum retrieval. CLAIM remains robust in flexible and tautomeric systems for 13C NMR prediction, improves stereoisomer discrimination without explicit 3D modelling, and transfers to broader molecular property tasks including ADMET prediction and fluorescence estimation. These results establish physically grounded spectral alignment as an effective strategy for alleviating chemical-environment collapse and for guiding experimentally grounded molecular representation learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLAIM框架，通过对比学习将分子拓扑结构与原子分辨率的13C NMR数据对齐，解决化学环境表征坍缩问题，提升分子-光谱检索、立体异构体区分及多种分子性质预测任务。
AI.motivation: NMR光谱能提供局部化学环境信息，但受限于异构数据和不完整的原子级分配；分子拓扑等价的原子在真实环境中可能实验上不同，而3D描述又受限于动态构象的静态表示，导致“表征坍缩”问题。
AI.method: 构建互补的高保真实验与计算13C NMR资源，提出CLAIM框架，利用层次化化学先验知识和跨层级对比学习，将高效的拓扑分子输入与原子分辨的NMR观测值对齐。
AI.result: CLAIM在13C NMR预测中恢复丢失的化学分辨率，显著提升原子级分子-光谱检索性能；在柔性体系和互变异构体系中保持鲁棒性；无需显式3D建模即可改善立体异构体区分；迁移到ADMET预测和荧光估计等更广泛的分子性质任务。
AI.conclusion: 建立物理基础的谱图对齐是缓解化学环境坍缩和指导基于实验的分子表征学习的有效策略。

title: Localization phase diagram of the Hexagonal Lattice with irrational magnetic flux
summary: We study the Hofstadter model on a hexagonal lattice with irrational magnetic flux in this work. The Hofstadter model of the square lattice with irrational flux has been solved mathematically by Avila in his Fields medal work. However, this theory is usually not applicable to lattices with internal degrees of freedom, such as spin or sub-lattices. In this work, we show that for the hexagonal lattice with only nearest neighbor hopping, the system can still be characterized by a 2*2 transfer matrix and solved exactly by Avila$'$s global theory of Avila although this lattice has two sub-lattices. We obtained the exact localization phase diagram of the hexagonal lattice with irrational flux by this theory, which reveals three pure phases, that is, the extended, localized and critical states but no mobility edge due to the chiral symmetry. We used the renormalization group (RG) theory to verify these results, which can determine part of the phase diagram. We then computed the fractal dimension of the remaining part numerically. The results from both the RG theory and numerical analysis confirmed the phase diagram we get from Avila$'$s global theory.

AI.tldr: 本文利用Avila全局理论研究六角晶格上具有无理磁通量的Hofstadter模型，证明其可简化为2×2转移矩阵并精确求解，得到了包含扩展态、局域态和临界态三种纯态的精确局域化相图，并通过重整化群理论和数值计算验证了结果。
AI.motivation: Avila的Fields奖工作解决了方形晶格无理磁通Hofstadter模型的数学问题，但该理论通常不适用于具有内部自由度（如自旋或子晶格）的晶格。本文旨在探索六角晶格（含两个子晶格）是否仍可被Avila全局理论精确求解。
AI.method: 1. 将六角晶格Hofstadter模型（仅最近邻跳跃）简化为2×2转移矩阵；2. 应用Avila全局理论精确求解，得到局域化相图；3. 使用重整化群(RG)理论进行部分验证；4. 对剩余部分进行数值计算分形维数。
AI.result: 得到了六角晶格无理磁通下的精确局域化相图，揭示了三种纯相：扩展态、局域态和临界态，且由于手征对称性，不存在迁移率边。RG理论和数值计算均验证了Avila全局理论得到的相图。
AI.conclusion: 尽管六角晶格具有两个子晶格（内部自由度），但在仅最近邻跳跃条件下，系统仍可被Avila全局理论精确求解。该工作扩展了Avila理论在非方形晶格体系中的应用范围。

title: State Localization and Selective Charge Filtering Near a Null Point
summary: Null points in synthetically tunable molecular aggregates are predicted to generate flat energy bands analogous to those known in strongly correlated condensed-matter physics. For chemistry, null points provide a powerful design principle for photovoltaic materials with selective charge filtering similar to photosynthesis. However, null points have never been experimentally verified because their defining prediction - state localization with selective electron or hole transfer - has remained unobserved. Here, using a donor-acceptor dyad as a minimal model, we provide the first experimental observation of a null point. Impulsive pump-probe measurements reveal charge separation through a near-instantaneously generated locally excited-charge transfer (LE-CT) intermediate that emerges upon solvent stabilization of CT states. Polarization anisotropy directly reveals state localization and selective charge-filtering, spanning balanced electron-hole transfer to selective hole filtering consistent with synthetic design. A generalized vibronic theory of null points explains these observations and identifies the ideal synthetic parameters for achieving null points which are protected from the vibrational bath.

AI.tldr: 本文通过供体-受体二元体系首次实验验证了分子聚集体中"零点"的存在，展示了状态局域化和选择性电荷过滤特性，并建立了广义振动理论来解释这一现象。
AI.motivation: 零点在理论上被预测可以产生类似强关联凝聚态物理中的平带，并在化学中为光伏材料设计提供选择性电荷过滤原理，但始终缺乏实验验证。
AI.method: 使用供体-受体二元体系作为最小模型，通过脉冲泵浦-探测测量技术，结合偏振各向异性分析，观察电荷分离过程中的局域激发-电荷转移中间态。
AI.result: 首次实验观察到零点，证实了状态局域化和选择性电荷过滤特性，实现了从平衡电子-空穴传输到选择性空穴过滤的可调行为。
AI.conclusion: 建立了广义振动理论解释零点现象，并确定了实现受振动浴保护零点的理想合成参数。

title: Orbital and Spin Nernst Effects in Monolayers of Transition Metal Dichalcogenides
summary: In recent years, orbitronic effects have attracted growing attention as complementary counterparts to the well-established spintronic phenomena. In this work, we demonstrate that monolayers of transition metal dichalcogenides provide an excellent platform for the observation of the orbital Nernst effect, a relatively less explored phenomenon describing the generation of a transverse orbital current in response to an applied temperature gradient. We show that, similar to its electrical counterpart, viz., the orbital Hall effect, the orbital Nernst effect does not require the presence of spin-orbit coupling. Analytical results based on a low-energy valley model offer key insights into the underlying mechanisms, highlighting in particular the crucial role of electronic states at the Fermi energy for the emergence of this effect. The inclusion of spin-orbit coupling further gives rise to a spin Nernst effect, which scales with the strength of spin-orbit coupling and vanishes in its absence. We substantiate our analytical findings with full Brillouin-zone tight-binding results for two representative systems, monolayer 2H MoS$_2$ and 2H NbS$_2$. Our results show that while both orbital and spin Nernst conductivities in MoS$_2$ require electron or hole doping, both effects are intrinsically present in metallic NbS$_2$. Our work reveals the central role of orbital and spin Berry curvatures, identifies doping as an effective route for tuning orbital and spin Nernst responses, and proposes a possible experimental setup for detecting these effects in monolayer transition metal dichalcogenides.

AI.tldr: 本文在单层过渡金属二硫族化物（TMDs）中展示了轨道能斯特效应（轨道Nernst效应）的存在，该效应不需要自旋-轨道耦合；同时自旋-轨道耦合会进一步产生自旋Nernst效应。通过低能谷模型分析和全布里渊区紧束缚计算，揭示了轨道和自旋Berry曲率的关键作用，并指出掺杂是调控这些效应的有效手段。
AI.motivation: 轨道电子学效应作为自旋电子学的互补方向日益受到关注，但轨道Nernst效应（温度梯度驱动横向轨道电流）仍缺乏研究。本文旨在探索单层TMDs中轨道Nernst效应的存在性及其物理机制。
AI.method: 采用低能谷模型进行解析推导，结合全布里渊区紧束缚方法对单层2H MoS₂和2H NbS₂进行数值计算，分析轨道和自旋Berry曲率，并比较两者在半导体（MoS₂）和金属（NbS₂）体系中的行为差异。
AI.result: （1）轨道Nernst效应不依赖自旋-轨道耦合，其关键来自费米能级附近的电子态；（2）自旋-轨道耦合产生自旋Nernst效应，强度随自旋-轨道耦合增大；（3）MoS₂中两种效应都需要掺杂，而NbS₂中本征存在；（4）轨道和自旋Berry曲率是核心驱动机制。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了轨道和自旋Berry曲率的核心作用，指出掺杂是调控轨道/自旋Nernst响应的有效途径，并提出了在单层TMDs中检测这些效应的实验方案，为轨道电子学领域提供了重要理论支撑。

title: Chiral Porphyrin Monolayers on Ferromagnetic Thin Films: Ultrafast Spectroscopy of Hybrid Interfaces
summary: Hybrid ferromagnetic metal/organic interfaces (spinterfaces) exhibit unique properties, including spin filtering. In parallel, chiral organic molecules can themselves induce efficient spin filtering, leading to unexpectedly high spin polarizations. Here, we investigate how the proximity of gold-capped Co/Ni ferromagnetic multilayers influences the spectroscopic properties and photoinduced electron dynamics of chiral oligopeptides bearing a porphyrin chromophore. The molecules are covalently attached to the gold cap via a chiral linker, forming a self-assembled monolayer. The porphyrin macrocycles adopt an orientation parallel to the surface, resulting in the formation of J-like aggregates. Photoinduced dynamics are probed using femtosecond pump-probe transient absorption spectroscopy. Despite excitation of only a single molecular layer, a clear transient absorption signal of the porphyrin singlet excited state is observed. Adsorption on the metal surface leads to a pronounced reduction of the excited-state lifetime. However, no signatures of long-lived photoinduced charge-transfer products are detected. Furthermore, no dependence of the excited-state dynamics on either the magnetization direction of the ferromagnetic layer or the molecular chirality is observed.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了手性寡肽修饰的钴/镍铁磁多层膜界面的光激发电子动力学，发现尽管观察到卟啉单线态激发态的信号，但激发态寿命显著缩短，且未检测到长寿命光致电荷转移产物，也未观察到激发态动力学对磁化方向或分子手性的依赖。
AI.motivation: 探究铁磁金属/有机自旋界面（spinterface）中，手性有机分子与铁磁层之间的相互作用如何影响界面处的光谱特性和光致电子动力学，特别是想寻找可能的自旋依赖电荷转移或自旋过滤效应的光学证据。
AI.method: 使用金包覆的Co/Ni铁磁多层膜，通过手性连接体共价键合手性寡肽（含卟啉生色团）形成自组装单层膜。采用飞秒泵浦-探测瞬态吸收光谱探测光致激发态动力学。
AI.result: 卟啉分子在表面平行取向形成J-型聚集体；单分子层即可检测到清晰的卟啉单线态瞬态吸收信号；金属表面吸附显著缩短了激发态寿命；未检测到长寿命电荷转移产物；激发态动力学既不依赖铁磁层的磁化方向，也不依赖分子手性。
AI.conclusion: 在该杂化自旋界面体系中，金属表面的强淬灭效应主导了激发态弛豫过程，掩盖了潜在的自旋相关效应。未观察到手性或磁化方向对光致电子动力学的影响，说明该体系在光激发条件下可能不支持有效的自旋选择性电荷分离。

title: Ytterbium charge state and stabilization in the Ba(Ca)F$_2$ host by electron paramagnetic resonance and infrared photoluminescence
summary: Lanthanide-doped fluorides are promising materials for advanced photonic and quantum applications due to their wide bandgap, low phonon energy, and chemical stability. In this work, we present a systematic comparative study of ytterbium incorporation at low doping levels (0.05--0.2 mol\%) in BaF$_2$ and CaF$_2$ single crystals, focusing on the interplay between host lattice properties, charge-state stabilization, and defect formation mechanisms. Using a combination of X-ray diffraction (XRD), X-ray photoelectron spectroscopy (XPS), electron paramagnetic resonance (EPR), transmittance, and infrared photoluminescence (IR PL), we explore how host lattice properties affect the stabilization of Yb$^{3+}$ and Yb$^{2+}$ ions. XRD confirmed cubic phase purity and lattice parameter stability in both hosts, while XPS revealed surface chemical composition variations associated with charge-compensating defects and trace impurities. EPR spectra indicated that BaF$_2$ favored perturbed Yb$^{3+}$ environments with increasing dopant levels, while CaF$_2$ maintained predominantly unperturbed sites, suggesting a more favorable ionic match for Yb$^{2+}$. Photothermal deflection spectroscopy (PDS) and IR PL results showed host-specific optical responses, with CaF$_2$ exhibiting crystal-field splitting and broader local field effects. These results reveal a clear decoupling between long-range structural stability and local lattice perturbations, and demonstrate that host cation identity governs the balance between Yb$^{2+}$ and Yb$^{3+}$ stabilization as well as defect-driven optical behavior. This offers valuable insights for optimizing rare-earth-doped fluoride crystals in laser, scintillator, and quantum device applications.

AI.tldr: 本文系统比较了低掺杂Yb在BaF₂和CaF₂单晶中的行为，发现宿主阳离子身份决定了Yb²⁺和Yb³⁺的稳定平衡及缺陷驱动的光学行为，为优化稀土掺杂氟化物晶体在激光、闪烁体和量子器件中的应用提供了重要见解。
AI.motivation: 探究宿主晶格性质（BaF₂ vs CaF₂）如何影响Yb离子的价态稳定性和缺陷形成机制，从而优化稀土掺杂氟化物在光子学和量子应用中的性能。
AI.method: 采用XRD、XPS、EPR、透射光谱、红外光致发光（IR PL）和光热偏转光谱（PDS）等多种表征手段，系统比较0.05–0.2 mol% Yb掺杂BaF₂和CaF₂单晶的结构、化学组成、缺陷和光学性质。
AI.result: XRD确认两宿主均为纯立方相且晶格参数稳定；XPS显示表面化学组成差异；EPR表明BaF₂中Yb³⁺环境随掺杂增加受扰动，而CaF₂保持未扰动位点；光学响应具宿主特异性，CaF₂表现出晶体场分裂和更宽的局域场效应。
AI.conclusion: 长程结构稳定性与局域晶格扰动存在解耦，宿主阳离子身份是调控Yb²⁺/Yb³⁺平衡和缺陷驱动光学行为的关键因素，为激光、闪烁体和量子器件中稀土掺杂氟化物的优化提供了指导。

title: One-dimensional relativistic hydrogen-like atom in Dirac materials: Energy spectra and supercritical states
summary: We consider a model of 1D relativistic hydrogen-like atom, formed by a Coulomb impurity in graphene nanoribbon. Describing the electron motion in terms of the one-dimensional Dirac equation for Coulomb potential taking into account the finite-size of the atomic nucleus, we compute the eigenvalues and eigenfunctions of the atomic electron. The cases of unconfined atom and atomin-box system are considered. Special focus is given calculation of supercritical energy levels and the critical charge. The latter is the value of the atomic nucleus charge, when the electronic state reaches the border of the Dirac sea. It is found that for confined atom the value of the critical charge is larger than that of free atom. Experimentally measurable characteristics, local density of states is also plotted for both cases. Existence of strong localization for atom-in-box system is shown.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了石墨烯纳米带中一维相对论性类氢原子模型，通过一维狄拉克方程计算了考虑有限核尺寸的原子能级和波函数，发现受限原子的临界电荷大于自由原子，并展示了态密度的强局域化现象。
AI.motivation: 探索石墨烯纳米带中类氢原子的相对论性量子行为，特别是超临界能级和临界电荷的物理规律，以及受限环境对原子性质的影响。
AI.method: 采用一维狄拉克方程描述电子运动，考虑库仑势和原子核有限尺寸，分别计算自由原子和盒子受限原子的本征值和本征函数。
AI.result: 受限原子的临界电荷值大于自由原子；展示了两种情况下局域态密度的分布，发现受限系统存在强局域化现象。
AI.conclusion: 原子核有限尺寸和空间约束共同影响超临界能级和临界电荷，受限环境增强了电子态的局域化程度。

title: Non-homogeneous structure of complex concentrated alloys: Effect of intrinsic strain
comment: This is a preprint article distributed under the CC-BY license
summary: Even if the atoms of a multicomponent alloy occupy a common lattice, their distribution is not homogeneous, and regions with different compositions can be detected. Three representative examples will be discussed: a Cantor-type system containing transition-metal elements (Cr, Mn, Fe, Ni, and Co), a refractory high-entropy alloy (Ti, Zr, Nb, Ta, and Mo), and a multicomponent system combining transition and refractory metals (Cu, Ni, Ti, Zr, and Hf). Using a combination of theoretical analysis and experimental observations, we demonstrate that the formation of locally segregated regions can lead to a reduction in the overall energy of the system. This stabilization arises from the compensation of tensile and compressive strain fields associated with atoms of different sizes, highlighting the key role of local chemical and structural heterogeneity in determining the thermodynamic stability of multicomponent alloys.

AI.tldr: 本文通过理论分析和实验观察，研究了多组分合金（包括Cantor型、难熔高熵合金及过渡-难熔混合体系）中原子分布不均匀导致的局部偏聚现象，发现这种局域化学和结构异质性通过补偿不同尺寸原子产生的拉伸和压缩应变场，能够降低系统总能量，从而提高合金的热力学稳定性。
AI.motivation: 探究多组分合金中原子分布不均匀（局部偏聚）的形成机制及其对系统热力学稳定性的影响，揭示局域化学与结构异质性的关键作用。
AI.method: 结合理论分析与实验观测，选取三种代表性多组分合金体系（Cantor型Cr-Mn-Fe-Ni-Co、难熔Ti-Zr-Nb-Ta-Mo、过渡-难熔混合Cu-Ni-Ti-Zr-Hf），分析局部偏聚区域的能量效应。
AI.result: 局部偏聚区域的形成能够降低系统总能量，这种稳定化效应源于不同尺寸原子产生的拉伸与压缩应变场的相互补偿。
AI.conclusion: 局域化学和结构异质性是多组分合金热力学稳定性的关键决定因素，为理解和设计高性能多组分合金提供了新视角。

title: Ultra-Fast Quantum Control via Non-Adiabatic Resonance Windows: A 9x Speed-up on 127-Qubit IBM Processors
summary: Standard adiabatic protocols for superconducting qubits often face a trade-off between gate speed and decoherence. In this work, using IBM Quantum 127-qubit processors (ibm_fez and ibm_kingston), we report the discovery of a fundamental non-adiabatic resonance window at about 4.9. This window demonstrates the potential for a 9.2-fold reduction in gate duration relative to the conventional adiabatic limit, while maintaining state high fidelities within the identified resonance windows. Through synchronous cross-backend execution, we demonstrate a near-perfect correlation (R = 0.9998) in the resonance profile, confirming the universality of the non-adiabatic parameter across independent hardware architectures. However, our longitudinal analysis reveals that these high-Q windows are sensitive to sub-percent calibration drifts, which dynamically shift the system into a stochastic regime. These findings suggest that achieving next-tier quantum performance requires a transition from static gate protocols to dynamic resonance-tracking control tools. This study provides both the theoretical foundation and the experimental evidence for such ultra-fast, high-performance quantum architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文在IBM 127量子比特处理器上发现了一个约4.9的非绝热共振窗口，可将门操作时间缩短9.2倍同时保持高保真度，但该窗口对校准时漂移敏感，需转向动态共振追踪控制。
AI.motivation: 传统绝热协议在超导量子比特中面临门速度与退相干之间的权衡，作者希望突破这一限制，寻找更快的量子门操作方案。
AI.method: 在IBM Quantum 127量子比特处理器（ibm_fez和ibm_kingston）上进行实验，通过同步跨后端执行验证共振曲线的普适性（R=0.9998），并进行了纵向分析研究校准漂移的影响。
AI.result: 发现约4.9的非绝热共振窗口，门持续时间可减少9.2倍且保持高保真度；跨硬件架构共振曲线几乎完美相关；但共振窗口对亚百分比级别的校准漂移敏感。
AI.conclusion: 实现下一代量子性能需要从静态门协议转向动态共振追踪控制工具，这项工作为超快高性能量子架构提供了理论基础和实验证据。

title: Parabolic-growth universality and its nucleation-driven breakdown across lithium-battery anode chemistries
summary: Solid-electrolyte interphase (SEI) growth is widely modeled cell-by-cell with chemistry-specific closures, yet its underlying kinetic scaling is rarely tested across chemistries. By compiling cycle-resolved data from public long-cycle datasets covering four anode configurations -- graphite, silicon composite, lithium metal, and anode-free -- we show that the cumulative interphase-loss index Lambda_int obeys the parabolic law Lambda_int = A_chem * sqrt(1 - Theta_Li) in three of the four chemistries, with an exponent indistinguishable from alpha = 1/2 within experimental uncertainty. The chemistry-specific prefactor A_chem spans an order of magnitude, but the diffusion-limited parabolic kinetics is preserved. The fourth chemistry, anode-free configurations, deviates with a super-parabolic exponent alpha approx 0.77, consistent with a nucleation-controlled growth regime. We rationalize the result using the Tammann-Deal-Grove parabolic-growth framework adapted to interphase formation and identify the conditions under which universality is recovered. The observed regularity reduces SEI modeling complexity to a single rate constant per chemistry and provides a sharp falsifiable test for next-generation cell formats.

AI.tldr: 通过分析四种阳极构型的循环数据，发现固体电解质界面相（SEI）生长在三种化学体系中遵循抛物线规律（指数α≈1/2），而无阳极构型呈现超抛物线指数（α≈0.77），表明扩散限制动力学具有跨化学体系的普适性。
AI.motivation: 尽管SEI生长广泛使用化学特异性闭包建模，但其动力学标度规律很少跨化学体系进行检验，缺乏对潜在普适性的理解。
AI.method: 编译来自公开长周期数据集的循环分辨数据，涵盖石墨、硅复合材料、锂金属和无阳极四种阳极构型，计算累积界面相损失指数Λ_int，并检验其与抛物线定律Λ_int = A_chem * sqrt(1 - Θ_Li)的吻合程度。
AI.result: 三种化学体系（石墨、硅复合材料、锂金属）的指数α与1/2无显著差异，符合扩散限制抛物线动力学；无阳极构型呈现α≈0.77的超抛物线指数，符合成核控制生长机制。化学特异性前因子A_chem跨体系变化一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 基于Tammann-Deal-Grove抛物线生长框架解释了结果，识别了恢复普适性的条件。该规律将SEI建模简化为每个化学体系仅需一个速率常数，并为下一代电池格式提供了可证伪的检验标准。

title: Saddle-node bifurcation in interfacial morphology selects battery degradation phase
summary: We propose a minimal nonlinear closure ODE for the dynamic active-area factor of a battery interface and show that it exhibits a saddle-node bifurcation when the smoothing rate saturates with surface roughness. The closure is the simplest physically motivated extension of a recently introduced single-fixed-point closure [C. Bae, in preparation (2026)]: u = K - u/(1 + alphau^2), where u = xi - 1 is the dimensionless excess active area, K the dimensionless drive, and alpha a single saturation parameter. The bifurcation occurs at K_c = 1/(2sqrt(alpha)), separating a smooth passivating phase from a morphologically unstable phase. Mapping four canonical anode configurations -- graphite, silicon composite, lithium metal, and anode-free Li/Cu -- onto the closure via end-of-cycling steady-state xi extracted from publicly available long-cycle data populates the stable branch with monotonically increasing K/K_c ratios: graphite (~0.01), silicon composite (~0.24), lithium metal (~0.73), and anode-free (~0.95). The anode-free configuration sits within 5% of the saddle-node threshold, predicting a vanishingly small operational stability window in current density, temperature, and electrolyte composition. We test three falsifiable predictions of the framework -- a critical current density, a critical temperature shift, and a mean-field critical-slowing-down exponent -- and find them broadly consistent with publicly available data. We argue that this near-critical position is universal to nucleation-controlled deposition on non-passivating substrates.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个最小非线性闭合ODE来描述电池界面的动态活性面积因子，发现其存在鞍结分岔。通过将四种阳极构型映射到该闭合模型，发现无阳极构型距离分岔阈值仅5%，预测其操作稳定性窗口极窄，并通过三个可证伪预测验证了模型的合理性。
AI.motivation: 作者希望用一个极简的物理模型捕捉电池界面粗糙度演化中的分岔行为，特别是理解无阳极锂金属电池为何稳定性窗口极窄，从而为电池设计提供理论指导。
AI.method: 提出一个包含单个饱和参数α的非线性闭合ODE：u̇ = K - u/(1 + αu²)，通过分析其鞍结分岔条件得到临界点K_c = 1/(2√α)，并将四种阳极构型（石墨、硅复合、锂金属、无阳极Li/Cu）的稳态数据映射到该模型上，检验其预测能力。
AI.result: 四种阳极的K/K_c比值单调递增：石墨(~0.01)、硅复合(~0.24)、锂金属(~0.73)、无阳极(~0.95)。无阳极构型距临界点仅5%，预测其操作窗口极小。三个可证伪预测（临界电流密度、临界温度偏移、平均场临界慢化指数）与公开数据一致。
AI.conclusion: 无阳极构型近乎临界的状态是成核控制沉积在非钝化基底上的普遍特征，该框架为理解电池界面稳定性提供了简洁而有力的理论工具。

title: Theory of Spin-splitter Magnetoresistance in Altermagnets
summary: We develop a theory of angle-dependent magnetoresistance (ADMR) in metallic altermagnets coupled to ferromagnetic insulators and establish criteria that distinguish them from conventional compensated magnets with spin-orbit coupling. We show that the spin-splitter magnetoresistance (SSMR) reported by H. Chen et al. [Adv. Mater. 37, 2507764 (2025)] constitutes a smoking-gun signature of collinear altermagnetism in metallic systems. In contrast to spin-Hall magnetoresistance (SMR), SSMR exhibits three key distinctions: it depends solely on the relative orientation between the ferromagnetic magnetization and the altermagnetic Néel vector, yields a longitudinal ADMR response of opposite sign, and features a direct proportionality between longitudinal and transverse ADMR signals, absent in SMR. These results provide a clear route to unambiguously identify altermagnets in transport.

AI.tldr: 本文发展了金属交错磁体中与铁磁绝缘体耦合的角依赖磁电阻理论，建立了区分它们与具有自旋轨道耦合的传统补偿磁体的标准，证明了自旋分裂磁电阻是共线交错磁性的标志性特征。
AI.motivation: 旨在建立一种能够明确识别金属体系中交错磁体的输运判据，弥补当前实验中缺乏可靠鉴别手段的空白。
AI.method: 通过理论分析金属交错磁体与铁磁绝缘体界面的角依赖磁电阻行为，对比自旋分裂磁电阻（SSMR）与自旋霍尔磁电阻（SMR）的差异。
AI.result: 发现SSMR与SMR有三大区别：1）仅依赖于铁磁磁化与交错磁Néel矢量的相对取向；2）纵向ADMR响应符号相反；3）纵向与横向ADMR信号呈正比关系，这在SMR中不存在。
AI.conclusion: 这些结果为在输运实验中明确识别交错磁体提供了清晰的路径，SSMR是共线交错磁性的"确凿证据"。

title: Strain-Enhanced Coherence in Curved hBN Quantum Emitters
summary: Hexagonal boron nitride (hBN) hosts robust room-temperature single-photon emitters, yet their coherence is typically limited by phonon induced dephasing and spectral broadening. Here, we show that thermally induced curvature in bulk like hBN flakes provides a strain enabled route to suppress defect phonon coupling under ambient conditions. Nanoscale bubbles formed by thermal processing generate strong through thickness strain gradients, which we directly probe by infrared nano spectroscopy. These measurements reveal strain induced splitting of in-plane phonon modes, evidencing a substantial local modification of the phonon density of states. Quantum emitters localized within these curved regions exhibit markedly enhanced room temperature spectral purity, with Debye Waller factors of 0.91 and narrower line widths than emitters in flat regions. Photon correlation measurements confirm high-purity single photon emission at room temperature. Supported by first-principles calculations, we attribute this behavior to strain driven phonon redistribution, which depletes phonons in tensile regions and accumulates them in compressive regions, thereby creating locally phonon suppressed environments for defect emitters. These results establish strain engineering as an effective route for phonon control in hBN and open a pathway toward high coherence, room-temperature quantum light sources for integrated nano photonic platforms.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了通过热诱导弯曲在六方氮化硼（hBN）中产生应变梯度，从而抑制缺陷-声子耦合，实现室温下具有高光谱纯度（Debye-Waller因子0.91）的单光子发射。
AI.motivation: hBN中的室温单光子发射器通常受声子诱导的退相干和光谱展宽限制，需要寻找有效抑制缺陷-声子耦合的方法。
AI.method: 通过热处理在hBN薄片中形成纳米级气泡，产生强厚度方向应变梯度；利用红外纳米光谱探测应变引起的声子模式分裂；结合第一性原理计算分析应变驱动的声子再分布机制。
AI.result: 应变梯度导致面内声子模式分裂，局部修改声子态密度；弯曲区域的量子发射器室温下Debye-Waller因子达0.91，线宽更窄；光子关联测量证实高纯度单光子发射。
AI.conclusion: 应变工程是hBN中有效的声子控制手段，为在集成纳米光子平台上实现高相干性、室温量子光源开辟了新途径。

title: Effective dynamic constants for nonequilibrium third-principles simulations
summary: Computational studies of the thermodynamic properties of materials at the mesoscopic and macroscopic scales -- involving lengths and times of at least $μ$m and $μ$s, respectively -- rely on a coarse-graining approximation such that only a few relevant collective variables are treated explicitly. Those variables typically take the form of fields defined everywhere in space or macroscopic quantities when spatial inhomogeneities can be treated implicitly. The free energy is usually expressed as a Landau-like potential whose temperature-dependent minima track stable states, characteristic equilibrium fluctuations being implicitly accounted for. Further, the response of the system to external perturbations, and its relaxation toward thermal equilibrium, are described in terms of simple equations of motion governed by effective inertial and viscous-damping constants. There is considerable literature on the problem of deriving Landau free energy potentials, from either experiment or predictive atomistic simulations, including recent efforts to develop systematic machine-learning approaches that we denote ``third principles''. Much less attention has received the calculation of the effective constants controlling the nonequilibrium macroscopic or mesoscopic dynamics. Here we tackle that problem, describing a protocol that allows us to compute the temperature-dependent inertial and damping coefficients associated to the electric polarization in representative soft-mode ferroelectric PbTiO$_{3}$. Our scheme lends itself to a widespread application, although the non-trivial behaviors found in PbTiO$_{3}$ suggest that more case studies will be needed to finetune a general and robust calculation protocol. Our results also allow us to comment on common assumptions in the literature of effective dynamic treatments of ferroelectrics and related materials.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从原子模拟中计算介观/宏观尺度非平衡动力学有效参数（惯性和阻尼系数）的方案，并以铁电体PbTiO₃为例展示了温度依赖的极化动力学系数，填补了现有“第三原理”方法只关注自由能而忽视动力学常数的空白。
AI.motivation: 现有文献大量关注如何从实验或原子级模拟推导Landau自由能势（包括近期系统性的机器学习方法，即“第三原理”），但很少关注控制非平衡介观/宏观动力学的有效常数（惯性和阻尼系数）的计算。本文旨在解决这一问题。
AI.method: 提出一个计算温度相关的惯性和阻尼系数的协议，并将其应用于代表性软模铁电体PbTiO₃的电极化动力学。
AI.result: 成功计算了PbTiO₃中与电极化相关的温度依赖的惯性和阻尼系数，发现非平凡行为表明需要更多案例研究来完善通用、稳健的计算协议。
AI.conclusion: 该方案具有广泛应用潜力，但PbTiO₃中的复杂行为提示需要更多案例研究来微调通用计算协议；同时结果有助于评述铁电体及相关材料有效动力学处理的常见假设。

title: Laser-induced demagnetization in a MAX phase (Cr0.5Mn0.5)2GaC
summary: Magnetic MAX phases are nanolaminated metals that combine ceramic-like thermal and mechanical stability with peculiar magnetic ordering, making them attractive for thin-film optoelectronics and spintronics. However, their magnetization dynamics remain largely unexplored. Here, we investigate laser-induced ultrafast demagnetization in a 40-nm-thick epitaxial film of the magnetic MAX phase (Cr0.5Mn0.5)2GaC, which magnetically orders below ~250 K, using time-resolved magneto-optical Kerr effect spectroscopy. We reveal, that the demagnetization transients exhibit a two-step type-II demagnetization - a signature of two-dimensional magnetic systems. The fast demagnetization stage is small at low temperatures and fluences but becomes prominent with increasing excitation. The second stage dominates the process and has a characteristic time of approximately 100 ps. Applying the three-temperature model, we extract the electron-lattice, spin-lattice, and electron-spin coupling constants. The reconstructed spin heat capacity exhibits a weak temperature dependence, accounting for the absence of significant slowing down of demagnetization at elevated temperatures and fluences. Our results provide a starting point for experimental optical control of magnetism in MAX phases, bringing this broad class of materials into modern 2D spintronics.

AI.tldr: 本文利用时间分辨磁光克尔效应光谱，研究了磁性MAX相(Cr0.5Mn0.5)2GaC薄膜的超快退磁动力学，发现其表现出二维磁性系统的两步II型退磁特征，并通过三温度模型提取了耦合常数，为MAX相材料在二维自旋电子学中的应用奠定了基础。
AI.motivation: 磁性MAX相兼具类陶瓷的热/机械稳定性与独特的磁有序，在薄膜光电子学和自旋电子学中具有应用潜力，但其磁化动力学尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 采用时间分辨磁光克尔效应光谱，对40 nm厚(Cr0.5Mn0.5)2GaC外延薄膜进行激光诱导超快退磁研究，并利用三温度模型分析耦合常数。
AI.result: 观察到两步II型退磁现象：快速退磁阶段在低温和低通量下较弱，随激发增强而显著；第二阶段主导退磁过程，特征时间约100 ps。自旋热容温度依赖性弱，解释了高温和高通量下退磁无明显减慢的现象。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果提供了MAX相中磁性光学控制的实验起点，推动该类材料进入现代二维自旋电子学领域。

title: Valley-contrasting Spin Textures in Janus Metal Phosphochalcogenides
summary: Momentum-resolved spin textures and potential valley-contrasting physical properties in the momentum space are two intriguing characteristics of noncentrosymmetric materials, and they have broad applications in spintronics and valleytronics. The realization of diverse spin textures within a single material, along with their further coupling to the valley degree of freedom, is highly desirable. Via first-principles calculations, we investigate electronic properties of Janus MP$_2$S$_3$Se$_3$ monolayers, which exhibits distinct spin textures at different valleys. While Ising-type spin textures are located at $K_\pm$ valleys, the symmetry breaking from the Janus structure brings about a coexistence of Weyl-type and Rashba-type spin textures at $Γ$ valley. In addition to valley-contrasting spin textures, valley dependence also occurs in Berry-curvature-driven anomalous Hall currents and optical selectivity. Besides, energy differences between $Γ$ and $K_\pm$, as well as band gaps, are highly tunable by applied strain. These findings present an intriguing coupling between diverse spin textures and multiple valleys, and pave the way for designing advanced electronic devices that leverage spin and valley degrees of freedom.

AI.tldr: 通过第一性原理计算，本文研究了Janus MP₂S₃Se₃单层材料，发现其在不同谷点具有多样的自旋织构（Ising型、Weyl型、Rashba型），并实现了自旋织构与谷自由度的耦合，同时展示了谷依赖的贝里曲率驱动反常霍尔电流和光学选择性，且带隙和能级差可通过应变调控。
AI.motivation: 非中心对称材料中的动量分辨自旋织构和谷对比物理性质在自旋电子学和谷电子学中有重要应用，但如何在单一材料中实现多种自旋织构并与谷自由度耦合是亟待解决的问题。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算方法，对Janus MP₂S₃Se₃单层进行电子性质研究，分析其不同谷点（K±和Γ）的自旋织构类型，并计算贝里曲率、反常霍尔电流和光学选择性，同时考察应变对能隙和能级差的调控。
AI.result: 在K±谷点观察到Ising型自旋织构，在Γ谷点由于Janus结构对称性破缺，同时存在Weyl型和Rashba型自旋织构。此外，发现谷依赖的贝里曲率驱动反常霍尔电流和光学选择性，且应变可有效调控Γ与K±之间的能量差以及带隙。
AI.conclusion: Janus MP₂S₃Se₃单层实现了多种自旋织构与多个谷自由度的耦合，为设计利用自旋和谷自由度的先进电子器件提供了新的途径。

title: Rare-Earth-Tuned Evolution from d- to f-Orbital Dominance and Giant Anomalous Hall Effect in Topological RGaGe (R = Ce, Pr, Nd) Semimetals
summary: The family of noncentrosymmetric rare-earth germanides RGaGe (R = Ce, Pr, Nd) provides a rich materials platform to explore the intertwined physics of strong magnetism, electronic correlations, and topological band structures. Through a combination of crystal growth, characterization, and first-principles calculations, we reveal that these compounds exhibit a pronounced uniaxial magnetic anisotropy, leading to distinct ground states: RGaGe orders ferromagnetically with moments along the crystallographic c-axis, and shows an antiferromagnetic-like structure in the ab-plane. A key finding is a significantly enhanced intrinsic anomalous Hall conductivity (AHC) compared to their well-known RAlGe counterparts, which even reaches as high as 948 Ω-1 cm-1 at 2 K in PrGaGe. Our theoretical analysis predicts that this AHC originates from a robust Weyl semimetallic state driven by inversion symmetry breaking, where Weyl points near the Fermi level couple strongly to the magnetic order. Importantly, this topological state persists above the magnetic ordering temperature, confirming its intrinsic electronic origin. Our calculation also reveals that, while the near-Fermi-level states in CeGaGe and PrGaGe are dominated by d-orbital contributions, NdGaGe exhibits significant f-orbital involvement, signaling a progressive evolution from d- to f-orbital dominated topology. These results establish the RGaGe system as a tunable platform for systematically extending the RAlGe-related family, showcasing a large anomalous Hall response and orbital evolution near the Fermi level, and advancing the understanding of the interplay between topology and magnetism in quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了非中心对称稀土锗化物RGaGe（R = Ce, Pr, Nd）家族，发现其具有显著的单轴磁各向异性和增强的异常霍尔电导（最高达948 Ω⁻¹ cm⁻¹），理论预测其源于反演对称性破缺驱动的Weyl半金属态，且该拓扑态在磁有序温度以上仍存在。此外，NdGaGe展现出从d轨道到f轨道主导的拓扑态演化。
AI.motivation: 探索非中心对称稀土锗化物RGaGe家族中强磁性、电子关联与拓扑能带结构的交织物理，并寻找可调控的拓扑量子材料平台。
AI.method: 结合晶体生长、表征实验与第一性原理计算，分析磁各向异性、异常霍尔电导，并通过理论计算预测Weyl半金属态及其轨道贡献。
AI.result: RGaGe表现出显著的c轴铁磁序和ab面反铁磁-like结构；异常霍尔电导显著增强，PrGaGe在2K时高达948 Ω⁻¹ cm⁻¹；理论预测存在Weyl半金属态，且拓扑态在磁有序温度以上仍稳定存在；NdGaGe表现出f轨道贡献的显著参与，呈现d→f轨道演化趋势。
AI.conclusion: RGaGe体系是一个可调控的拓扑量子材料平台，展示了大的异常霍尔响应和费米面附近轨道演化的特征，增进了对拓扑与磁性交织物理的理解。

title: Data-driven body-centered cubic phase prediction in cobalt free high-entropy alloys
summary: High-entropy alloys (HEAs) are known for superb combination of performance attributes, making them ideal for advanced applications, e.g., nuclear engineering. The concept of cobalt-free HEAs aims to mitigate concerns about cobalt's radioactivity, however, predicting their phase formation remains challenging due to their complex compositions. In this work, we integrate six semiempirical parameters, i.e., mixing entropy (ΔSmix), mixing enthalpy (ΔHmix), atomic size difference (δ), valence electron concentration (VEC), d-orbital energy level (Md), and the Ω parameter, along with machine learning (ML) to predict the body-centered cubic phase stability in Co free HEAs. To address the limitations of experimental data, generative adversarial networks were used to augment the dataset, thus improving the accuracy of the Gaussian process classification model used for phase prediction. After dimensionality reduction to five principal components, the model achieved an accuracy of 84%, with ΔHmix and δ identified as the key descriptors influencing phase formation. This approach highlights the synergy of ML and data augmentation in accelerating the design of HEAs for advanced applications.

AI.tldr: 本文整合六个半经验参数与机器学习，利用生成对抗网络扩充数据，建立高斯过程分类模型预测无钴高熵合金的BCC相稳定性，准确率达84%，其中ΔHmix和δ是关键描述符。
AI.motivation: 无钴高熵合金可避免钴的放射性问题，但其复杂成分导致相形成预测困难，亟需高效预测方法加速材料设计。
AI.method: 集成ΔSmix、ΔHmix、δ、VEC、Md、Ω六个半经验参数，结合生成对抗网络数据增强和高斯过程分类模型，经主成分分析降维至五维后进行相预测。
AI.result: 模型预测准确率达84%，ΔHmix（混合焓）和δ（原子尺寸差）是影响BCC相形成的最关键描述符。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习和数据增强的协同作用能有效加速无钴高熵合金的设计，为先进工程应用提供新途径。

title: Thermodynamics and dynamics of non-compact prismatic dislocation loops simulated using a machine-learning model
summary: We explore how the thermodynamic properties and dynamics of a self-interstitial prismatic dislocation loop are affected by microscopic-scale variations in its geometric configuration, an aspect that rarely received attention in literature. First, we develop a machine-learning (ML) model to predict the formation energy of an arbitrary geometrically complex configuration of a self-interstitial atom dislocation loop. Trained on atomistic simulation data, the ML model achieves high predictive accuracy across a broad range of configurations, with a typical error in the 1% range. Second, from the ML model, we evaluate the density of configurational microstates as a function of loop's formation energy and derive analytical expressions valid in tractable limiting cases. Using statistical mechanics, we derive the configurational free energy, the average energy, and the thermodynamic entropy of a dislocation loop as a function of temperature. Third, we simulate the dynamics of self-climb of dislocation loops with various geometries and evaluate their diffusion coefficients and effective activation energies. Our analysis shows that there is a single universal parameter describing the morphological irregularity of loop configurations in its ground state. This parameter determines the thermodynamic properties of a loop as well as its dynamics, and simulations illustrate how the properties and mobility of a configurationally complex loop vary as functions of the irregularity parameter.

AI.tldr: 本文通过机器学习模型预测位错环的构型能量，并结合统计力学与动力学模拟，研究了自间隙棱柱位错环的几何构型复杂性对其热力学性质和自攀移动力学的影响，发现了一个描述构型不规则性的普适参数。
AI.motivation: 微观尺度的几何构型变化对位错环热力学和动力学性质的影响长期被忽视，作者旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 1. 开发机器学习模型预测任意复杂构型位错环的形成能；2. 基于ML模型评估构型微状态密度，推导自由能、平均能量和熵的解析表达式；3. 模拟不同几何构型位错环的自攀移动力学，计算扩散系数和有效激活能。
AI.result: ML模型预测误差约1%；发现一个描述基态构型不规则性的普适参数，该参数同时决定位错环的热力学性质和动力学行为。
AI.conclusion: 构型不规则性是控制位错环热力学性质与迁移率的关键因素，该普适参数为理解复杂构型位错环的行为提供了统一框架。

title: Oxygen vacancies beyond the dilute limit in doped CaMnO3 perovskites and implications for screening materials in thermochemical applications
summary: Thermochemical energy storage (TCES) in oxide perovskites relies on reversible oxygen vacancy formation, and computational high-throughput screening of candidate materials has predominantly used the single oxygen vacancy formation energy (OVFE) as the key descriptor. We demonstrate that the OVFE is insufficient for screening cubic CaMnO3 perovskites, because the stoichiometric compound is not the minimum energy reference state; vacancies are inherently present at operating temperatures. Materials with negative single OVFEs are routinely excluded from screening datasets as unsuitable, but this reflects a mischoice of reference state rather than a genuine materials limitation, and risks discarding promising TCES candidates. We address this by computing OVFEs as a function of vacancy concentration using ab initio density functional theory, establishing the equilibrium vacancy concentration as the correct reference point. OVFE curves referenced to this minimum align with experimentally measured reduction enthalpies, providing a framework directly comparable to experiments. We further show that A-site and B-site doping modify the vacancy formation landscape through distinct mechanisms. A-site dopants act primarily through strain relaxation and symmetry breaking, while B-site dopants reshape the local redox environment and introduce strong configurational dependence. Finally, we develop a thermodynamic model incorporating configurational entropy that accurately predicts equilibrium oxygen stoichiometry as a function of temperature and oxygen partial pressure and reveals that selective reduction of Mn4+ versus B-site dopant ions can tune the onset temperature for vacancy formation. These results establish a screening framework for perovskite TCES materials and provide practical guidance for extending high-throughput workflows beyond the single-vacancy paradigm.

AI.tldr: 本文指出，以单个氧空位形成能（OVFE）作为钙钛矿热化学储能（TCES）材料高通量筛选的关键描述符是不充分的，因为化学计量比化合物并非能量最低参考态——在运行温度下空位是固有存在的。作者提出以平衡空位浓度作为参考点，通过DFT计算OVFE随空位浓度的变化曲线，并建立了包含构型熵的热力学模型，可准确预测平衡氧化学计量比。研究还揭示了A位和B位掺杂的不同调控机制，为TCES材料筛选提供了新的框架。
AI.motivation: 现有高通量筛选以单个OVFE为描述符，但无法准确描述钙钛矿TCES材料在实际工况下的热化学行为，且会误排除具有负OVFE的候选材料。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理DFT计算OVFE随空位浓度的函数关系，建立平衡空位浓度参考态；构建包含构型熵的热力学模型预测平衡氧化学计量比与温度、氧分压的关系；分析A/B位掺杂对空位形成的影响机制。
AI.result: OVFE曲线以平衡空位浓度为参考后与实验测得的还原焓一致；A位掺杂主要通过应变弛豫和对称性破缺起作用，B位掺杂改变局域氧化还原环境并引入构型依赖性；所建模型能准确预测氧化学计量比，且Mn4+与B位掺杂离子的选择性还原可调控空位形成的起始温度。
AI.conclusion: 建立了超越单空位范式的高通量筛选框架，为钙钛矿TCES材料的理性设计提供了理论指导和实用方法。

title: Micro-environment of the Eu interstitial in $β$-SiAlON:Eu$^{2+}$ green phosphor
summary: The precise atomic-scale structure around Eu$^{2+}$ activators in the $β$-Si$_{6-z}$Al$_z$O$_z$N$_{8-z}$:Eu$^{2+}$ commercial green phosphor remains elusive. We use the first-principles $Δ$SCF excited-state method, embedding of the interatomic force constants for supercells up to 3501 atoms, and Huang-Rhys theory to clarify this issue. Monte Carlo exploration is used to identify representative low-energy structural models spanning different levels of Al/O concentration $z$. For the lowest-energy structure at low $z$, our computed photoluminescence spectrum reproduces the experimental vibronic peaks at 6~K with excellent agreement in peak positions and intensities, validating the Eu-N$_9$ coordination model with Al, O, and Eu confined to the same crystallographic plane. Analysis of the low-energy structures reveals that the electron-phonon coupling is weak ($S \approx 2.15$) with a robust characteristic phonon signature across different Al/O arrangements, explaining the surprising persistence of resolved phonon replicas with increasing $z$. We explain the experimentally observed red-shift of emission with increasing $z$ through systematic trends in zero-phonon line energies, modest increases in Huang-Rhys factors, and larger configurational diversity at higher compositions.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理ΔSCF激发态方法、大超胞力常数嵌入技术和黄-里斯理论，首次揭示了商业绿色荧光粉β-Si6-zAlzOzN8-z:Eu²⁺中Eu²⁺激活剂的精确原子尺度结构。研究发现Eu-N₉配位模型，确认Al、O和Eu共面；电子-声子耦合较弱（S≈2.15），解释了随Al/O浓度增加而保持的清晰声子复制现象，并阐明了发射红移的机制。
AI.motivation: 商业绿色荧光粉中Eu²⁺激活剂周围的精确原子尺度结构一直难以确定，作者希望利用先进的第一性原理方法解决这一长期存在的结构谜题。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理ΔSCF激发态方法计算激发态性质，结合嵌入原子间力常数方法构建高达3501个原子的大超胞，运用黄-里斯理论分析电子-声子耦合，并通过蒙特卡洛搜索识别不同Al/O浓度下的代表性低能结构模型。
AI.result: 计算的光致发光谱在6K下与实验振动峰在峰位和强度上高度吻合；电子-声子耦合较弱（S≈2.15），具有稳健的特征声子信号；发现零声子线能量系统降低、黄-里斯因子适度增加及更高组分下的构型多样性是发射红移的原因。
AI.conclusion: 成功解析了Eu²⁺在β-SiAlON荧光粉中的局域原子结构，揭示了Eu-N₉配位模型及其电子-声子耦合特性，为理解这类重要发光材料的构效关系提供了原子尺度的理论基础。

title: Optical selection rules in hexagonal Ge polytypes and their lifting by symmetry perturbation
comment: 21 pages, 7 figures, submitted to Phys. Rev. B
summary: Hexagonal germanium polytypes have emerged as promising direct-gap semiconductors for silicon-integrated optoelectronics, yet their optical properties remain largely unexplored beyond the well-studied 2H phase. We present a comprehensive theoretical study of optical properties of hexagonal 2H-, 4H-, and 6H-Ge polytypes through ab initio calculations of quasiparticle band structures, dipole transition matrix elements, and solution of the Bethe-Salpeter equation. While all three polytypes exhibit direct band gaps of increasing size from 2H to 6H, we reveal that the fundamental optical transition in 4H-Ge is parity-forbidden due to matching band parities at the valence and conduction band edges. This selection rule results in a radiative lifetime seven orders of magnitude longer than in 2H- and 6H-Ge, severely limiting light emission capabilities. To demonstrate that the selection rule can be lifted, we introduce controlled symmetry perturbations by substituting single Ge atoms with Si in each unit cell, breaking the crystal symmetry. This perturbation increases the optical matrix elements by up to two orders of magnitude and reduces radiative lifetimes for all perturbed polytypes. We also compute absorption coefficients and frequency-dependent dielectric tensors for both light polarizations, including excitonic effects up to 5 eV, providing complete optical characterization of ideal and symmetry-perturbed hexagonal Ge systems relevant for optoelectronic applications.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算系统研究了六方2H、4H和6H-Ge多型体的光学性质，发现4H-Ge因能带边缘宇称匹配导致基本光学跃迁被禁止，辐射寿命比2H和6H-Ge长七个数量级；通过掺入Si打破对称性可有效提升光学矩阵元并降低辐射寿命。
AI.motivation: 六方锗多型体被视为有前景的硅基集成光电子直接带隙半导体，但除2H相外，其他多型体的光学性质尚未被充分探索，因此需要系统研究其光学特性。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算，包括准粒子能带结构、偶极跃迁矩阵元及求解Bethe-Salpeter方程，并通过Si替代Ge打破晶体对称性。
AI.result: 发现4H-Ge因能带边缘宇称匹配导致光学跃迁被禁止，辐射寿命比2H和6H-Ge长七个数量级；Si掺杂可将光学矩阵元提升两个数量级并显著降低辐射寿命。
AI.conclusion: 对称性破坏是解决宇称禁戒跃迁、实现高效光发射的关键，为六方Ge多型体在光电子应用中的调控提供了理论依据。
